_meta.purpose: Real cooking instructions + ingredients extracted from the two source cookbooks for PrepIQ.

jalal::spicy chicken wraps.name: Spicy Chicken Wraps
ingredients: 600g (21oz) Raw Chicken Breast, cut into strips
Handful Shredded Lettuce or choice of leafy veg
steps: Slice the chicken breast into thin strips. Place in a bowl, add minced garlic, oregano, paprika, onion powder, chili flakes, salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Mix everything well to evenly coat the chicken strips with the seasoning.

Heat a pan over medium heat and lightly coat it with cooking spray or a small amount of olive oil. Add the marinated chicken strips to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until the chicken is golden brown and cooked through.
In a separate bowl, combine fat-free yogurt, sriracha, minced garlic, fresh parsley, salt, pepper, and a splash of lemon juice. Stir until smooth and well combined.
Take a low-calorie wrap and lay down a bed of shredded lettuce. Top with the cooked chicken strips, red onion, tomatoes, and a generous amount of the spicy sauce.
If you prefer a toasted wrap, heat a pan over medium heat and lightly toast the wrap for 1-2 minutes on each side until crispy and golden. Serve immediately and enjoy your flavorful chicken wrap!

jalal::honey bbq chicken mac cheese.name: Honey BBQ Chicken Mac & Cheese
ingredients: 60ml (2.1oz) Buffalo Hot Sauce (or hot sauce of choice)
steps: Cut the chicken breasts into small cubes. In a bowl, mix the chicken with minced garlic, black pepper, paprika, salt, and olive oil. Stir until the chicken is evenly coated. Optional: Add a little extra paprika or a dash of turmeric for deeper color.
While the chicken is marinating, bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the macaroni pasta according to the package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.

Heat a pan over medium-high heat and spray lightly with cooking spray (or add a small amount of oil). Add the seasoned chicken cubes and cook for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown and slightly charred. Ensure the chicken is fully cooked through. Turn off the heat completely. Drizzle in the honey and BBQ sauce, then toss the chicken to coat evenly. Transfer to a bowl and set aside.

In the same pan (no need to clean it), reduce the heat to low. Pour in the milk and hot sauce, then add the cream cheese and shredded cheddar. Gently whisk until the cheese has melted and the sauce is smooth, thick, and creamy.
Add the cooked macaroni to the cheese sauce and stir to combine. Serve in bowls and top with the BBQ honey chicken. Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!

jalal::high protein peri peri chicken pa.name: High Protein Peri Peri Chicken Pasta
ingredients: 100ml (3.5oz) Pasta Water (taken from the pot you cook pasta in)
80g (2.8oz) Nando’s Peri Peri Sauce or Marinade
Extra Seasoning to taste (Salt, Pepper, Oregano, Chilli Flakes)
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into thinner fillets. Season both sides generously with oregano, paprika, garlic powder, chili flakes, salt, black pepper, and a drizzle of olive oil. Mix until evenly coated, then set aside.
Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Add the penne pasta and cook for 8-10 minutes until al dente. Once cooked, reserve ¼ cup of pasta water, then drain the rest.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add olive oil. Cook the chicken fillets in batches for 3-4 minutes per side, until golden brown and fully cooked. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan on medium heat, add chopped onions and red bell pepper. Sauté for 2 minutes until softened, then stir in tomato paste and cook for another 2-3 minutes until fragrant.

Lower the heat then add skimmed milk, light cream cheese, reserved pasta water, and Nando’s Peri Peri sauce. Stir until the sauce thickens and becomes creamy. Adjust seasoning, mix in fresh parsley, and add the cooked pasta. Toss until fully coated and creamy.
Slice the chicken into thin strips and place on top of the pasta. Garnish with grated parmesan and parsley, then ENJOY!

jalal::chicken fajita rice.name: Chicken Fajita Rice
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into thinner fillets for quicker cooking. Season both sides evenly with spices, lemon juice, and olive oil. Set aside to marinate.
Thinly slice the onions and bell peppers. For the green sauce, blend all sauce ingredients until smooth. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Set aside.
Heat a pan over medium heat and spray lightly with cooking spray. Cook the chicken fillets for 3–4 minutes per side until nicely browned and fully cooked. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, add the sliced onions and bell peppers. Cook for 3–4 minutes until slightly softened.
Add washed, uncooked rice to the pan with the vegetables. Sprinkle in your seasonings, then stir and toast for about 2 minutes.
Pour in water and bring to a light simmer. Cover the pan, reduce heat to low, and cook for 8–10 minutes until the rice is fluffy and tender.
Slice the cooked chicken into strips. Serve over the rice and top with a generous drizzle of the green sauce. Enjoy!

jalal::korean fried chicken burgers.name: Korean Fried Chicken Burgers
ingredients: Chicken Breasts cut into halves (4 pieces)
steps: Tenderise the chicken breasts to ensure even thickness, then slice each one in half. Season both sides with salt, paprika, garlic powder, and chilli powder.

Prepare your breading stations: one bowl with an egg wash and another with seasoned breadcrumbs. Dip each chicken fillet into the egg wash, then coat completely in the crumbs, pressing to ensure full coverage. Place the coated fillets on a tray, spray with cooking spray, and bake at 200°C (392°F) for 20 minutes.

While the chicken bakes, thinly slice the red cabbage, carrots, and cucumber. Mix the cabbage and carrots with light mayo and pepper to make a quick slaw. In a separate bowl, combine the cucumber with the listed pickling ingredients and mix well.
In a small pot over low heat, add all the ingredients for the glaze. Bring it to a gentle bubble and let it simmer for a few minutes until it thickens slightly.
Once the chicken is cooked and crispy, brush or toss it with the warm glaze until evenly coated.
Toast the brioche buns, then assemble: add a layer of slaw, some pickled cucumber, a piece of glazed crispy chicken, a light drizzle of spicy mayo, and a sprinkle of sesame seeds. Enjoy!

jalal::chicken chow mein noodles.name: Chicken Chow Mein Noodles
ingredients: 700g (24.7oz) Chicken Breast cut into thin strips
steps: Slice the chicken into thin strips, then marinate with paprika, black pepper, garlic powder, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well and let it marinate for as long as possible to enhance the flavor.
Slice all the vegetables while the chicken marinates. Cook the noodles according to the package instructions—usually by boiling and simmering for 4–5 minutes. Drain the noodles and set them aside.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add a light coating of cooking spray. Cook the marinated chicken for 6–8 minutes, or until golden brown and fully cooked. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, add the sliced onion, bell pepper, and green onion. Stir- fry for about 5 minutes until the vegetables are slightly softened.
Add minced garlic, soy sauce, oyster sauce, rice vinegar, and the cooked noodles to the pan. Stir everything together until the noodles are evenly coated and well combined.
Add the cooked chicken back into the pan along with bean sprouts. Mix once more, ensuring everything is evenly incorporated.
Garnish with sesame seeds and chilli flakes . Distribute into 4 equal servings and enjoy!

jalal::high protein creamy chicken.name: High Protein Creamy Chicken
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) chicken breasts cut into cubes (raw weight)
1 Tsp Garlic powder or fresh Garlic
steps: Cut the chicken breast into small cubes and place them in a bowl. Marinate with olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, basil, chilli flakes, and salt. Mix thoroughly until the chicken is evenly coated. Set aside.
In a blender cup, combine milk, cream cheese, parmesan, and the seasoning mix. Blend for a couple of minutes until completely smooth and creamy.

Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat and spray lightly with oil. Add the marinated chicken and cook for about 4 minutes on one side until golden. Flip the chicken, lower the heat, then pour the blended sauce over it. Gently mix to coat.
Add a handful of spinach to the pan, then cover and let it simmer for 8–10 minutes. About halfway through, lift the lid and stir the wilted spinach into the sauce.
Check that the sauce has thickened to your liking. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed before turning off the heat.
Serve the creamy chicken over a bed of white rice. Garnish with fresh herbs and enjoy!

jalal::crispy sticky orange chicken.name: Crispy & Sticky Orange Chicken
ingredients: 170ml (6oz) Fresh Orange Juice (you can squeeze from fresh oranges)
Sesame Seeds Green Onion / Scallion serve
steps: Cut the chicken breast into cubes, then season with salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic powder. For a crispy coating, add cornflour and a pinch of baking powder. Mix thoroughly until all the chicken pieces are evenly coated.

Heat a pan over high heat and spray with cooking spray or add a bit of olive oil. Cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden and crispy. Once done, transfer to a plate lined with paper towel to absorb excess oil.

In the same pan, lower the heat and add chopped garlic, ginger, and chilli flakes. Sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant. Add orange juice, soy sauce, honey, and orange zest to the pan. Stir well, bring to a boil, then reduce the sauce for 3–4 minutes to concentrate the flavor.

In a small bowl, mix cornflour (or cornstarch) with a bit of water, then pour it into the pan. Stir continuously until the sauce thickens. Add the crispy chicken back into the pan and toss to coat it well in the sticky orange sauce.
Garnish with sesame seeds and chopped green onion. Serve hot with rice and enjoy!

jalal::high protein alfredo pasta.name: High Protein Alfredo Pasta
ingredients: 1/2 Cup Pasta Water with Parsley Parmesan
steps: Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook for about 8 minutes or until al dente. Reserve ½ cup of the pasta water, then drain the rest and set the pasta aside.
Slice the chicken into cutlets for quicker, even cooking. Season with garlic powder, Italian herbs, paprika, onion powder, salt, pepper, and olive oil. Mix until the chicken is fully coated.
In a blender, combine milk, cream cheese, parmesan, Italian herbs, and the reserved pasta water. Blend until the sauce is smooth and creamy. Add salt if needed.
Heat a pan over medium heat. Cook the seasoned chicken for about 5 minutes on each side until golden and fully cooked. Remove from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add chopped onions and fresh garlic. Cook for a minute or two until fragrant and softened.
Pour in the blended sauce and bring it to a gentle bubble. Add the cooked pasta and sliced chicken back into the pan. Simmer everything together for 3–5 minutes to let the flavors combine.
Garnish with chopped parsley and extra parmesan. Serve hot and enjoy!

jalal::creamy chicken mac cheese.name: Creamy Chicken Mac and Cheese
ingredients: 1 Tsp each: Salt, Pepper, Paprika, Oregano and Garlic Powder (adjust to your preference)
120g (4.2oz) Light or Fat Free Cream Cheese
170g (6oz) Uncooked Macaroni (Optional) Coriander or Parsley for Garnish
steps: Cut the chicken breasts into cubes and season with olive oil, salt, pepper, paprika, oregano, and garlic powder. Mix well to coat evenly and set aside to marinate.
Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Add the macaroni pasta and cook for 8–10 minutes until al dente. Reserve a bit of pasta water, then drain the rest and set the pasta aside.
Heat a pan over medium heat and spray lightly with cooking spray. Add the chicken and cook for 6–8 minutes until golden and fully cooked through. Remove the chicken from the pan and set it aside.

In the same pan over low heat, add low-fat milk, light cream cheese, cheddar cheese, and a splash of hot sauce. Stir with a whisk or spatula until everything melts and the sauce becomes smooth and creamy.
Add the cooked macaroni to the sauce and stir until well combined. Add the cooked chicken back in and mix everything together.
Garnish with chopped parsley and enjoy!

jalal::crispy orange chicken sandwich.name: Crispy Orange Chicken Sandwich
ingredients: 5g (1 Tsp) Cornflour mixed with 40ml (1.4oz) Water (helps thicken the sauce)
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into four burger-sized fillets. Season both sides with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder until evenly coated.

On one plate, mix the crushed cornflakes with the same seasonings. In a separate bowl, crack 1–2 eggs and whisk to create an egg wash. Dip each chicken fillet into the egg wash, then press into the cornflake crumbs until fully coated. Place the coated pieces on a baking tray.
Spray with cooking spray, then bake in the oven for 20 minutes at 200°C or air fry for 12–14 minutes at the same temperature until crispy and golden.

While the chicken cooks, make the glaze. In a pan, combine orange juice, soy sauce, honey, sriracha, and orange zest. Bring to a boil, then stir in a cornflour slurry (cornflour mixed with water) and let it thicken.

Prepare the slaw by combining finely chopped cabbage, red onion, grated carrot, and green onion in a bowl. Add a splash of light soy sauce and rice vinegar. Mix well and let it sit to absorb the flavors.
Once the chicken is cooked, brush or spoon the glaze generously over each piece.
Assemble your burgers: spread spicy mayo on the bottom brioche bun, add the slaw, place the glazed crispy chicken on top, sprinkle with sesame seeds, and finish with the top bun. Enjoy!

jalal::honey garlic chicken noodles.name: Honey Garlic Chicken Noodles
ingredients: 1 Tbsp or 20ml Dark or Light Soy Sauce
70ml (2.6oz) Soy Sauce (Low Sodium Light or Dark Mixed with Water)
steps: Add garlic, paprika, black pepper, soy sauce, honey, and sriracha to the chicken thighs. Mix well and let marinate—30 minutes is great, but overnight will give the best flavor.
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add the noodles and simmer on low heat for 4–6 minutes until tender. Drain and transfer the noodles to a bowl or pan.

Heat a pan over medium-low heat and add a bit of olive oil. Cook the marinated chicken for 4–5 minutes on each side, flipping once it’s nicely browned. Once cooked through, set the chicken aside to rest.
In a separate bowl, combine the sauce ingredients and mix well. Pour the sauce over the warm noodles and toss until they’re evenly coated.
Slice the rested chicken into strips or keep whole if you prefer. Place the chicken on top of the noodles.
Garnish with sesame seeds and chopped green onions. Divide into 4 servings and enjoy!

jalal::butter chicken pasta meal prep.name: Butter Chicken Pasta Meal Prep
ingredients: 600g (21.2oz) Chicken Breast, cubed (You can use Chicken Thighs instead for better flavour)
1-2 tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray for Cooking Chicken Sauce
2 Large Tomatoes Chopped or 1 Canned Tomatoes (400g)
steps: Cut the chicken into cubes and marinate with spices, lemon juice, and yogurt. Mix well and let it sit for at least 30 minutes.

While the chicken marinates, slice the onion. In a pan over medium heat, melt a bit of light butter, then cook the onions for 3 minutes. Add chopped tomatoes, cashews, and extra seasoning. Cook for 5 minutes, then stir in yogurt.
Let the mixture cool slightly, then blend until smooth and creamy. Meanwhile, cook the pasta according to package instructions, then drain and set aside.
In the same pan, cook the marinated chicken for about 4 minutes on each side until golden and fully cooked.
Pour the blended sauce into the pan with the chicken, then add the cooked pasta. Mix well until everything is fully coated and heated through.
Garnish with fresh coriander , divide into 4 portions, and enjoy!

jalal::halal cart chicken rice.name: Halal Cart Chicken & Rice
ingredients: Add water then bring to a boil then simmer on low heat for 8-10 mins till fully cooked
steps: Slice the chicken into cubes and season with olive oil, lemon juice, and all the listed spices. Mix well until fully coated.
In a pot, add washed uncooked rice, the spices, and water. Bring to a light bubble, then cover and simmer on low heat until the rice is fully cooked and fluffy.
While the rice cooks, heat a pan over medium-high heat. Cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown. Avoid overcrowding the pan to get a nice sear.
In a bowl, make the sauce by combining yogurt, light mayo, fresh garlic, chopped coriander, salt, pepper, cumin , and lemon juice . Mix until smooth and well blended.
Once everything is cooked, assemble the dish by plating the rice and topping it with the golden chicken.
Drizzle the garlic yogurt sauce over the top, garnish if you like, and enjoy — or distribute into 4 meal prep containers for later!

jalal::burrito bowl meal prep.name: Burrito Bowl Meal Prep
steps: Slice the chicken breast into cubes and season with all the listed spices and lime juice. Mix thoroughly until evenly coated—add more seasoning if the color looks too pale.
In a blender, combine avocado, yogurt, coriander, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Blend until smooth and creamy, then store in the fridge if prepping ahead.
Rinse the basmati rice and add it to a pot with double the amount of water. Stir in the spices and tomato paste, bring to a light boil, then cover and simmer on low heat until fully cooked.
Heat a pan over medium heat with cooking spray or olive oil. Cook the chicken for about 3 minutes per side until golden brown and fully cooked. Set aside.
In the same pan, cook sliced onion and bell pepper for about 5 minutes until softened and slightly charred.
Plate the rice and top with chicken, shredded lettuce, sautéed onions and peppers, sweet corn, black beans , and a drizzle of green sauce . Divide into 4 portions and enjoy!

jalal::high protein cheesy chicken tacos.name: High Protein Cheesy Chicken Tacos
ingredients: 2 Chicken Breasts cut in halves (giving you 4 thinner pieces)
1/2 Red and Green Bell Pepper, chopped
1/2 the amount of seasonings used for the chicken
steps: Butterfly cut the chicken breasts, then season both sides generously with oregano, garlic powder, paprika, onion powder, chilli flakes, salt, pepper, and olive oil.

Heat a pan over medium heat and cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown. Lower the heat if it starts to brown too quickly. Once cooked, transfer to a board and shred using two forks or knives.

In the same pan, add chopped onions and bell peppers with a bit more seasoning. Cook for about 5 minutes until softened, then stir in canned tomatoes, a splash of water, and the shredded chicken. Let it simmer for 3–4 minutes.
Take your taco wraps and lightly dip them into the chicken mixture for extra flavor. Place them on a separate pan, fill with the chicken mix and shredded mozzarella, then fold in half.
Toast both sides of the tacos for 1–2 minutes until crisp and golden. Serve hot and enjoy!

jalal::chicken fajita wraps.name: Chicken Fajita Wraps
ingredients: Avocado Lime Sauce: (can be made in bulk)
steps: Slice the chicken into strips, then season with paprika, parsley, cumin, garlic powder, chilli powder, salt, pepper, and lime juice. Mix thoroughly until well coated.
Heat a pan over medium heat with olive oil or cooking spray. Cook the chicken for 6–8 minutes until golden and cooked through, then set aside.
In the same pan, add sliced bell peppers and onions with the same seasoning mix. Cook for about 5 minutes until softened.

To make the creamy avocado sauce, blend together avocado, fat free yogurt, big handful of coriander/cilantro, pinch of salt, black pepper, garlic powder and squeeze of lime juice until smooth and creamy. Bottle it up to serve later.
Grab Lebanese flatbread or your wrap of choice. Add shredded lettuce, sliced red onion, tomato, the cooked chicken, and a generous drizzle of the lemon pepper sauce. Wrap it up and enjoy!

jalal::lemon pepper chicken wraps.name: Lemon Pepper Chicken Wraps
ingredients: 3 Minced Garlic Cloves or 1 Tsp Garlic Powder
Use a whisk to fully combine and mix till smooth
steps: Slice the chicken thighs into bite-sized pieces, then add fresh minced garlic, oregano, paprika, salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Mix well and let it marinate for as long as possible.
Soak wooden skewers in water, then skewer the marinated chicken pieces and place them on a baking tray.
Preheat the oven to 200°C and bake the chicken for 30 minutes until golden brown and juicy. Alternatively, you can air fry for about 18 minutes.
While the chicken cooks, make the lemon pepper sauce by whisking together light mayo, sriracha, salt, pepper, paprika, and lemon juice until smooth and creamy.
Grab Lebanese flatbread or any wrap of your choice. Add shredded lettuce, sliced red onion, tomato, the juicy cooked chicken, and a generous drizzle of the lemon pepper sauce. Wrap and enjoy!

jalal::crispy chicken wraps.name: Crispy Chicken Wraps
ingredients: 1/2 Tsp Garlic Powder or 1 Garlic Clove, Minced
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into 5–6 strips each (about 10–12 total). Season with paprika, oregano, garlic, salt, and buffalo sauce. Mix until evenly coated.
On a separate plate, add crushed cornflakes and season with the same spices used on the chicken (omit the salt if preferred).

Coat each chicken strip fully in the cornflake mixture, pressing to ensure they’re well covered. Place on a wire rack or baking tray, spray with cooking spray, and bake for 20 minutes at 200°C or air fry for 12 minutes at 200°C.
While the chicken cooks, make the Buffalo Garlic Sauce by mixing all listed ingredients in a bowl until smooth.
Once the chicken is done, grab a low-calorie wrap and layer with shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, the crispy chicken, and a generous drizzle of buffalo garlic sauce. Wrap it up and enjoy!

jalal::lemon garlic kebabs.name: Lemon Garlic Kebabs
ingredients: 4 Chicken Breast Cut Into Medium Cubes (10 Cubes per Chicken Breast, 4-5 Cubes per Skewer, Total 8 Skewers)
A Good Handful of Fresh Mint or Dried Mint
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into medium-sized cubes, then marinate with the listed spices, lemon juice, and yogurt. Mix well and let it sit for at least 30 minutes (overnight for best flavor).
Skewer the marinated chicken pieces along with your choice of vegetables—red onion and red/green bell peppers work great.
To make the mint sauce, blend yogurt, fresh mint leaves, garlic cloves, salt, pepper, and lemon juice until smooth and creamy.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat with olive oil, then cook the skewers for about 5 minutes on each side until golden brown. Set aside.
In the same pan, add chopped onions and bell peppers. Cook for 1 minute, then add turmeric, cumin, paprika, salt, and uncooked basmati rice. Stir and toast for 2–3 minutes.
Add water, bring to a light bubble, then cover and simmer for 8 minutes until the rice is fully cooked. Serve with the chicken skewers and a generous spoonful of mint sauce. Enjoy!

jalal::peri peri chicken spicy rice.name: Peri Peri Chicken & Spicy Rice
steps: Marinate chicken thighs with Nando’s Peri Peri marinade, smoked paprika, onion powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well and let sit for at least 20 minutes or overnight for deeper flavor.
Chop 1 onion and 1 red bell pepper. Rinse 120g of uncooked basmati rice and set aside for later.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat, add a bit of light butter, and cook the chicken thighs for 4 minutes on each side until golden with grill/sear marks. Set aside to cool.
In the same pan, add the chopped onion and red bell pepper. Cook for 1 minute, then add the spices and tomato paste. Stir and cook for another 2–3 minutes.

Add the rinsed basmati rice and stir until everything is well combined. Pour in 250ml water or chicken stock, bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer for 8–10 minutes until the rice is fully cooked and fluffy.
Slice the cooked chicken into strips, layer over the rice , garnish with chopped coriander, drizzle with Nando’s Peri Peri sauce, and enjoy!

jalal::creamy mozzarella pasta meal prep.name: Creamy Mozzarella Pasta Meal Prep
ingredients: 600g (21.2oz) Raw Chicken Breast Cut Into Cubes
1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
198g (7oz) Uncooked Pasta (Roughly 440g Cooked Weight (3.9oz) Per Serving)
steps: Slice the chicken into cubes and season with all the listed spices. Mix well until evenly coated.
Heat a pan on medium heat with olive oil or cooking spray. Cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown, then set aside.
Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Cook your pasta for 8–9 minutes until al dente. Reserve ½ cup of pasta water, then drain the rest.
In the same pan, add chopped garlic and onion. Sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Lower the heat completely and add milk, cream cheese, reserved pasta water, and mozzarella. Stir gently until the sauce thickens and becomes smooth.
Add the cooked pasta and chicken to the sauce. Mix everything together, garnish with chili flakes and parsley, then portion into 4 servings and enjoy!

jalal::honey lemon chicken meal prep.name: Honey Lemon Chicken Meal Prep
steps: Cut the chicken into cubes and season with soy sauce, paprika, garlic powder, and lemon juice. Mix until the color changes. (Optional: marinate for 30 minutes.)
Heat a pan on medium with olive oil. Cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden. Turn off the heat, drizzle with honey, and toss to coat. Set aside.
In the same pan, add chopped onion and bell pepper. Cook for about 4 minutes until soft.
Add cooked rice to the pan, followed by more soy sauce, honey, and lemon juice. Mix well.
Return the chicken to the pan, combine everything, garnish with green onion, and portion into 4 servings. Enjoy!

jalal::fried rice burritos.name: Fried Rice Burritos
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Raw Chicken Breast Cut Into Cubes
steps: Cut the chicken breast into cubes and season with paprika, black pepper, garlic powder, and soy sauce. Mix well.
Heat a pan on medium with olive oil or cooking spray. Cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden, then set aside.
In the same pan, add mixed vegetables and cook for 1–2 minutes. Push the veg to one side, crack in the eggs and scramble, then mix together.
Add cooked rice, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil. Stir well, then add the chicken back in and combine everything.
Fill a low carb tortilla with the fried rice mix, extra chicken, pickled onions, spicy lemon mayo, and green onion. Fold like a burrito and enjoy!

jalal::peri peri burgers.name: Peri Peri Burgers
ingredients: Pinch of Garlic Powder, Powder, Paprika, Salt &
steps: Season chicken thighs with garlic powder, smoked paprika, cumin, onion powder, salt, pepper, Nando’s marinade, and lemon juice. Mix well (optional: marinate for 30 mins).
Heat a pan on medium, add light butter, and cook the chicken for 5–7 minutes on each side until a good crust forms. Set aside to rest.
In a bowl, combine all the listed ingredients to make the Perinaise. Mix until smooth and well combined.
Toast brioche buns. Layer with Perinaise, lettuce, tomato slices, one chicken piece, a cheese slice, then the second chicken piece and pickled red onions.
Serve hot and enjoy!

jalal::cheesy chicken pizza dilla.name: Cheesy Chicken Pizza-Dilla
ingredients: Chicken Seasoning: Salt, Pepper, Paprika, Oregano, Garlic Powder
1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
steps: Butterfly cut your chicken breast and season with salt, pepper, paprika, oregano, and garlic powder.
Heat a pan on medium, cook the chicken for 4 minutes on each side, then remove and shred using two forks.
In the same pan, place one tortilla, spread some tomato paste, then layer with shredded chicken, chopped onion, tomato, and cheese. Place a second tortilla on top.
Repeat the process if making more. Transfer to a baking tray and bake at 180°C for 5–8 minutes until golden and the cheese is melted.
Garnish with parsley and drizzle with sriracha mayo. Serve and enjoy!

jalal::sweet n sour chicken fried rice.name: Sweet n Sour Chicken Fried Rice
ingredients: 1 Tsp Cornflour mixed with 20ml (1oz) of Water
Then Evenly Distribute into 4 Equal Servings
steps: Cut chicken breast into cubes, then season with salt, pepper, paprika, garlic, corn flour, and baking powder. Mix until well coated.
In a pan over medium-low heat, add cooking spray and mixed veg. Cook for 1 minute, then add eggs and scramble. Mix with the veg.
Add cooked rice along with soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil. Stir well and set the fried rice aside in a bowl or dish.
In the same pan, cook the chicken for 4–5 minutes on each side until golden and crispy. Set aside.
On low heat, add garlic and ginger . Cook until fragrant, then pour in pineapple juice, soy sauce, honey, tomato sauce, and a corn flour slurry. Let it thicken.
Add crispy chicken, onion, bell pepper, and pineapple pieces to the sauce. Mix well, serve with the fried rice , and prep your portions for the week!

jalal::high protein mac cheese burritos.name: High Protein Mac & Cheese Burritos
ingredients: In a pan on low heat
Add Equal Amount Per Burrito Toast in a Pan
steps: Slice the chicken breast into thinner pieces, season with all the listed spices, and mix until both sides are well coated.
In a blender cup, add all the cheese sauce ingredients and spices. Blend in 10-second intervals until completely smooth.
Heat a pan on medium with cooking spray or olive oil. Cook the chicken for 5 minutes on each side until golden, then shred using forks or knives.
While the chicken cooks, boil the macaroni pasta until al dente, then drain.
On low heat, add the cooked pasta, cheese sauce, and shredded chicken to the same pan. Mix until everything is well combined.
Spoon the mac & cheese mixture into low-calorie wraps, fold into burritos, toast on a pan, wrap in foil, and ENJOY!

jalal::mango habanero chicken.name: Mango Habanero Chicken
steps: Cube the chicken breasts and season with all the listed spices and ingredients. Let it marinate for a few minutes.
Heat a pan on medium with cooking spray or olive oil. Cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown, then set aside.
In the same pan, add light butter and crushed garlic. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add mango juice, honey, hot sauce, paprika, and lime juice. Stir to combine and let it bubble and simmer for 3–4 minutes until slightly thickened.
Return the cooked chicken to the pan, stir to coat well in the sauce, and let it simmer for another 2 minutes.
Garnish with chopped coriander and serve with hot rice. ENJOY!

jalal::creamy butter chicken garlic naan.name: Creamy Butter Chicken & Garlic Naan
ingredients: 1/2 Tsp of Each Seasoning Used Earlier
steps: Slice the chicken into cubes, then marinate with all the listed ingredients. Mix until the colour changes and set aside.
In a pan over medium heat, add light butter and sliced onion with the same seasonings. Cook for 2 minutes, then add chopped tomatoes, peanut butter, and yogurt. Mix until fully combined.
Let the mixture cool for 5 minutes, then transfer to a blender and blend in 10–15 second increments until smooth and creamy.
In the same pan, cook the marinated chicken on high heat for 4 minutes. Lower the heat, pour in the blended sauce, mix, and simmer for another 2–3 minutes.
To make the garlic naan, combine flour, yogurt, baking powder, salt, and garlic in a bowl. Mix and knead into a smooth dough.
Roll out the dough into thin rounds, sprinkle with parsley , and cook on a pan for 2–3 minutes on each side. Serve with the chicken and ENJOY!

jalal::high protein pesto pasta.name: High Protein Pesto Pasta
ingredients: 1 Large Chicken Breast Cut Into 2 Thinner Fillets
steps: Fill a pot with water, add 1 tsp of salt, bring to a boil, then cook the spaghetti for 8 minutes. Reserve ½ cup of pasta water, then drain the rest.
Slice your chicken breast and season both sides evenly with garlic powder, paprika, basil, salt, and pepper.

In a blender cup, combine spinach, basil, olive oil, garlic, cream cheese, parmesan, cashew nuts, salt, pepper, lemon juice, and reserved pasta water. Blend until completely smooth to make the pesto sauce.
Heat a pan on medium heat, spray with cooking spray, then cook the chicken for 5 minutes on each side until golden and cooked through. Set aside.
Lower the heat, add the blended pesto sauce to the same pan, then add the cooked spaghetti. Mix until well combined.
Place the chicken pieces on top, garnish with extra basil, parmesan, and chilli flakes. Serve and ENJOY!

jalal::crispy chicken burgers.name: Crispy Chicken Burgers
ingredients: Chicken Breast Cut Into Thin Fillets (100g (3.5oz) Raw Each)
steps: Butterfly cut the chicken breast into thinner fillets. Season both sides with smoked paprika, onion powder, and garlic powder, rubbing the spices in well.
In one bowl, add crushed cornflakes and season with the same spices used for the chicken. In a second bowl, crack in 2 eggs and whisk until smooth.
Dip each chicken fillet into the egg wash, then coat thoroughly in the seasoned cornflakes. Place the coated chicken onto a baking tray (preferably with a wired rack).
Bake in a preheated oven at 200°C (390°F) for 18–20 minutes or air fry at 180°C (360°F) for 18 minutes until golden and crispy.
While the chicken cooks, toast the brioche buns and prep your toppings: lettuce, tomato, pickles, light cheese , and special sauce .
Assemble the burger: spread the sauce on the buns, layer with lettuce, tomato, crispy chicken, cheese, and pickles. Serve & ENJOY!

jalal::buffalo chicken mac cheese.name: Buffalo Chicken Mac & Cheese
steps: Slice the chicken breast into 2 thinner fillets, then season both sides with paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, pepper, and olive oil. Rub the spices in to evenly coat.
Cook the chicken on medium heat for 4–5 minutes on each side until fully cooked. Remove from the pan and shred into pieces using two forks.
To make the cheese sauce, add cottage cheese, cream cheese, buffalo sauce, cheddar, milk, garlic powder, and onion powder into a blender. Blend for 2 minutes until smooth and creamy.
In a pot, bring salted water to a boil. Add the uncooked pasta and boil for 8 minutes. Drain and set aside.
On low heat, add the cooked pasta to a pan along with the cheese sauce. Mix together until well combined and heated through.
Add the shredded chicken to the pasta, mix it all together, and serve hot. ENJOY!

jalal::honey garlic chicken.name: Honey Garlic Chicken
ingredients: 2 Tbsp Light Soy Mixed with 3-4 Tbsp Water
20g (1oz) Honey + Extra Drizzle For the End
Garnish with Green Onion and Sesame Seeds
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into halves and season both sides with garlic powder, paprika, black pepper, and soy sauce.
In a bowl, mix light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and chilli flakes to make the sauce.
Cook the chicken in a pan over medium heat for 4–5 minutes each side. Lower the heat, add garlic and the sauce, let it caramelise for 2–3 minutes, then set the chicken aside.
In the same pan, cook sliced red onion and bell pepper for 2 minutes, then add cooked rice and the remaining sauce. Mix well.
Serve the rice with the chicken on top, garnish as desired, and ENJOY!

jalal::crispy garlic parmesan wings.name: Crispy Garlic Parmesan Wings
ingredients: 1 Tbsp Baking Powder (Makes Them Extra Crispy!)
steps: Wash the chicken wings and pat them dry thoroughly using tissue paper.
Place the wings in a large bowl and season with garlic powder, onion powder, oregano, paprika, salt, pepper, and baking powder. Mix until each wing is evenly coated.
Lay the wings flat on a baking tray or preferably a wired rack. Spray with cooking spray and bake in a preheated oven at 200ºC (400ºF) for 30 minutes.
While the wings are baking, chop 2–3 garlic cloves, parsley, and grate some parmesan cheese.
Once the wings are cooked, transfer them to a bowl. Add the garlic, parmesan, and parsley. Toss well to coat and ENJOY!

jalal::sticky sesame wings.name: Sticky Sesame Wings
ingredients: 16 Pieces in Total. You Can Trim Some of the Skin Off as Well to Lower the Fat!
15g (0.5oz) Brown Sugar Stevia or Light Brown Sugar
Garnish with Fresh Parsley Overnight for Best Flavour!
steps: Wash the chicken wings and pat them completely dry using tissue paper to help them crisp up in the oven.

Place the wings in a large oven dish and season with paprika, oregano, chilli flakes, chopped garlic, lime juice, light brown sugar, sesame seeds, and light soy sauce. Mix well until all wings are evenly coated.
Preheat your oven to 200°C (400°F). Bake the wings for 30 minutes, or air fry at the same temperature for 15–18 minutes until golden and cooked through.
Once cooked, remove from the oven or air fryer and transfer to a serving plate.
Garnish with freshly chopped parsley and serve hot.

jalal::chicken fajita bowl.name: Chicken Fajita Bowl
ingredients: A Good Handful of Fresh Cilantro or Parsley
1 Tsp Garlic Powder or 1 Garlic Clove
1/2 Tsp of Each Seasoning Used for the Chicken (When Cooking)
steps: Slice the chicken into cubes, then season with onion powder, garlic powder, cumin, paprika, chilli powder, salt, pepper, and lime juice. Mix well and set aside to marinate.
For the green sauce, blend avocado, yogurt, coriander or parsley, lime juice, garlic, salt, and water until smooth and creamy. Add more water if the sauce is too thick.
In a pot, cook washed rice with salted water . Once done, mix in chopped coriander and lime juice, then let it steam.

In a pan over medium heat, cook the marinated chicken in olive oil for 4 minutes on each side until golden brown. Set aside. In the same pan, cook sliced onion and bell peppers with more seasoning for 5 minutes.
To serve, plate 120g of cooked rice with the chicken, bell peppers, black beans, sweetcorn, extra lime , and a generous drizzle of green sauce. ENJOY!

jalal::creamy chicken pasta.name: Creamy Chicken Pasta
ingredients: 1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
1/2 Tsp each, Salt, Pepper, Paprika and Basil
130g (4.6oz) Uncooked Pasta (I Used Penne for 2 servings)
Boil in Water with 1 Tsp Salt
steps: Cube the chicken and season with paprika, garlic, basil, chili flakes, salt, and pepper. Mix well and set aside to marinate.
Bring a pot of salted water to a boil, then add the uncooked penne pasta. Cook for 8 minutes until al dente. Reserve some pasta water, then drain the rest.

Heat a pan on medium, add olive oil, garlic cloves, red bell pepper, and tomatoes. Season with salt, pepper, paprika, and basil. Cook for 5 minutes until soft, then transfer the mixture to a blender cup.
In the blender cup, add cream cheese, reserved pasta water, and fresh basil. Blend until smooth and creamy.
In the same pan on medium heat, cook the chicken for 8 minutes. Add the cooked pasta and creamy sauce , mix well on low heat, then serve and enjoy!

jalal::kfc zinger rice box.name: KFC Zinger Rice Box
ingredients: 1 Chicken Breast Cut Into Halves (2 Fillets Roughly 160g (5.6oz) each)
1 Egg (Only Used a Fraction of the Egg Per Chicken Piece)
Bake or Air Fry for 19 mins at 190°C / 380°F mayo sauce
30g (1.1oz) Fat Free Yogurt (I Used Greek Yogurt)
1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
steps: Slice your chicken breasts in halves, then season both sides with smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion salt, and chilli powder. Ensure they’re evenly coated.
Set up your breading stations. Plate 1: crushed cornflakes mixed with the same spices as the chicken. Plate 2: beaten eggs or egg whites.
Dip the chicken into the eggs, let the excess drip off, then coat in the cornflake crumbs. Place on a baking tray.
Bake in a preheated oven or air fry at 190°C / 380°F for 19 minutes until golden and crispy.

While the chicken cooks, heat olive oil in a pot, add diced onion and bell pepper , cook for 1 minute. Add tomato paste, uncooked rice, paprika, cumin, and salt . Simmer until the rice is fully cooked.
Make the garlic mayo , then assemble your bowl with a bed of rice, lettuce, sweetcorn, bell pepper, the crispy chicken, and a generous drizzle of garlic mayo. ENJOY!

jalal::creamy tuscan chicken pasta.name: Creamy Tuscan Chicken Pasta
ingredients: 2 Chicken Breasts Cut Into Halves (Roughly 160g Each Piece)
1 Tsp Salt for the Water sauce
steps: Butterfly cut the chicken breast and season both sides with smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion salt, and chilli powder.
Bring salted water to a boil in a pot, add uncooked pasta, and cook for 8 minutes until al dente. Reserve ½ cup of pasta water, drain the rest, and set the pasta aside.
In a blender cup, add milk, cream cheese, parmesan, Italian herbs, and the reserved pasta water. Blend until smooth and creamy.
Cook the chicken in a pan over medium heat for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown, then set aside.

In the same pan, add olive oil, chopped garlic, and finely chopped onion. Cook for 1–2 minutes, then add tomato paste, cherry tomatoes, and sun-dried tomatoes. Cook for another minute, then turn off the heat and stir in the creamy sauce until it begins to thicken.

Add a handful of spinach and let it wilt, then add the cooked pasta. Turn the heat back on low, mix everything together, place the chicken on top, simmer for 4–5 minutes, garnish with parsley, and enjoy.

jalal::crispy chicken fried rice.name: Crispy Chicken Fried Rice
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Raw Chicken Breast, cut into cubes
15-20g (1oz) Corn Flour (You Can Use Plain Flour)
1 Cup Mixed Veg (100g, 3.5oz) (I Used Carrots, Corn and Peas
1 Tbsp Soy Sauce (Can Add More if Needed)
steps: Cut the chicken into cubes and season with garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, black pepper, soy sauce, and cornflour. Mix well until all pieces are fully coated.
Heat a pan on high heat, spray with cooking spray or add a little olive oil, then cook the chicken for 2–3 minutes on each side until golden and crispy. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, add mixed vegetables and cook for 2 minutes. Push the vegetables to one side of the pan and crack in the eggs. Scramble them while cooking, then mix together with the vegetables.
Add the cooked rice to the pan along with soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil. Stir everything together until evenly coated and heated through.
Return the crispy chicken to the pan, mix it in well, garnish with chopped green onion, and serve hot.

jalal::healthy pad thai.name: Healthy Pad Thai
ingredients: 1 Tbsp Brown Sugar Stevia or Any Sweetener
2 Shallots, Chopped or 1 White Onion, Chopped
steps: Slice the chicken into cubes, season with soy sauce, garlic powder, and black pepper. Mix until well coated and set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix soy sauce, tamarind paste, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, and water to create the sauce.
Place rice noodles in a large bowl with boiling water and let them soak for 4–5 minutes (or follow packet instructions), then drain and set aside.
Heat a pan or wok on medium, add cooking spray , and cook the chicken for 5 minutes until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, sauté chopped garlic, shallots, and green onion for 30 seconds. Push to one side, crack in 2 eggs , scramble, then mix together.

Add cooked noodles and the sauce , mix well, then add back the chicken with crushed peanuts, bean sprouts, and green onion. Toss everything together, garnish with extra peanuts and lime juice, then enjoy!

jalal::high protein butter chicken.name: High Protein Butter Chicken
ingredients: 1/2 Tsp of Each Seasoning Used Earlier
steps: Slice the chicken into cubes, season with the listed ingredients, mix until the color changes, and set aside to marinate.
In a pan over medium heat, melt light butter, add sliced onions and the same seasoning, and cook for 2 minutes. Then add cashew nuts, chopped tomatoes, and yogurt. Stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a blender and blend until smooth and creamy.
In the same pan, cook the marinated chicken for 4 minutes on medium heat until golden.
Lower the heat, pour in the blended sauce, mix well, and simmer for 2–3 minutes. Serve with rice or naan bread and enjoy!

jalal::cheesy chicken quesadilla.name: Cheesy Chicken Quesadilla
ingredients: 1 Chicken Breast Cut Into 2 Thinner Cutlets
steps: Slice the chicken breast into 2 thin cutlets, season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, paprika, and oregano, then mix well.
In a blender cup, combine avocado, yogurt, coriander, garlic powder, salt, pepper, and lime juice. Blend until smooth and creamy, adding water if needed.
Cook the chicken on medium heat for 8–10 minutes until golden, then remove and shred using forks or a knife.
On low heat, pour whisked eggs into a pan and place a low-calorie tortilla wrap over them. Let it cook, then flip.
Add tomato slices, shredded chicken, and cheese to the wrap, fold, toast both sides for 1–2 minutes, then serve with the green dipping sauce and enjoy!

jalal::low calorie chicken biryani.name: Low Calorie Chicken Biryani
ingredients: 1/2 Tsp Chilli Powder or 1 Tbsp Paprika (If You Don’t Like Spicy)
280g (9.8oz) Cooked Basmati Rice (Make Sure It’s Fluffy Rice and Not Overcooked)
Saffron Water (Saffron Mixed in Boiling Water)
steps: Slice the chicken into bite-sized cubes and add all the marinade ingredients to a bowl. Mix thoroughly until the chicken is fully coated, then cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to let the flavours absorb.

Heat a pan on medium-high heat with olive oil, add two sliced onions and cook for 8–10 minutes until deeply browned and caramelised. Stir occasionally and cover the pan to help soften and brown the onions evenly.

Once the onions are golden, add cinnamon and cumin. Toast for 30 seconds, then add the marinated chicken and one chopped tomato. Cook for about 8 minutes, stirring once halfway through. Crush the tomato gently with a spatula to help it release its juices into the sauce.

In a separate pot, bring salted water to a boil and cook the rice until it’s 80% done (slightly firm inside). Drain the water, turn off the heat, and cover the pot to let the rice finish cooking in its own steam.

Spoon the cooked rice over the chicken mixture in the pan. Garnish with fresh coriander, saffron water, crispy onions, and optional green chillies . Gently fold the mixture to combine, being careful not to break the rice, then serve and enjoy.

jalal::healthy chicken tikka masala.name: Healthy Chicken Tikka Masala
ingredients: 300g 10.6oz) Raw Chicken Breast Cut Into Cubes
4 Garlic Cloves or 1 Tbsp Garlic Powder
1/2 Tsp Salt, Turmeric & Cumin to make it fluffy
1 Onion, Finely Chopped Add 1/2 Tsp of the Same Seasonings Used for Chicken
80-100g (3.5oz) Light Cream Cheese (You Can Use Yogurt or Coconut Milk Instead)
steps: Slice the chicken into cubes, then add all the seasonings along with Greek yogurt (or any yogurt you prefer). Mix well until the color changes, then marinate overnight for the best flavor.
In a pot, add washed uncooked basmati rice, water, turmeric, cumin, and salt. Bring to a gentle boil, then reduce to a simmer and cook until the rice is fluffy and fully cooked.
Heat a pan on medium, cook the chicken for 4 minutes on each side until golden, then set aside.
In the same pan, add chopped onion with more seasoning and cook for 2 minutes. Then add tomato sauce or canned tomatoes along with light cream cheese, stirring well. Return the chicken to the pan.
Mix everything together and let it simmer for 2-3 minutes. Garnish with coriander, serve with the yellow rice, and enjoy!

jalal::sweet sour chicken.name: Sweet and Sour Chicken
ingredients: 1 Tsp Corn Flour (To Thicken the Sauce)
Add 1/2 Tsp of the Same Seasonings Used for Chicken
80-100g (3.5oz) Light Cream Cheese (You Can Use Yogurt or Coconut Milk Instead|)
steps: Slice the chicken into bite-sized pieces, then season with garlic powder, salt, black pepper, soy sauce, and corn flour. Mix well until all pieces are evenly coated. Chop your vegetables into square pieces and set aside.

In a separate bowl, combine ketchup (preferably low sugar), light soy sauce, light brown sugar, rice vinegar, corn flour, and water. Stir until the mixture is smooth and the sugar has fully dissolved.
Heat a pan on high with cooking spray or olive oil, then cook the chicken for about 8 minutes (4 minutes per side) until golden and crispy. Remove the chicken and set aside.
In the same pan, add chopped onions and bell peppers. Cook for 4 minutes until slightly soft, then pour in the sauce and let it simmer until it thickens.
Add the cooked chicken back into the pan, mix everything together until well coated, then garnish with green onion and sesame seeds. Serve with rice and enjoy!

jalal::bbq chicken tenders.name: BBQ Chicken Tenders
ingredients: 400g (14.1oz) of Chicken Breast Cut Into Strips
steps: Cut the chicken into strips and place them in a bowl. Add BBQ sauce, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika. Mix well until all the strips are fully coated in the marinade.
In a separate bowl, mix crushed cornflakes with paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to make the dry coating.
Take each marinated chicken strip and coat it in the cornflake mixture, pressing gently to ensure they’re well coated. Place them on a wired rack over a baking tray.
Bake in a preheated oven at 200°C (390°F) for 18 minutes until crispy and golden.
Once cooked, brush each piece with more BBQ glaze for extra flavour, then serve and enjoy!

jalal::chow mein noodles.name: Chow Mein Noodles
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Chicken Breast, cut into strips or cubes
2 Tbsp Light Soy Sauce or Dark
steps: Slice the chicken breast into thin strips, then marinate with garlic powder, paprika, black pepper, and soy sauce. Mix well and set aside.
In a bowl, mix together soy sauce, oyster sauce, garlic powder, sesame oil, and water to make the stir-fry sauce.
Heat a pan on medium with cooking spray or a little oil, then cook the marinated chicken for 6–8 minutes until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, stir-fry sliced onions and bell peppers for 5 minutes. Add cooked egg noodles and pour in the prepared sauce . Mix until everything is well coated.
Return the cooked chicken to the pan, add chopped green onions and bean sprouts, mix everything one last time, then serve and enjoy!

jalal::high protein fried rice.name: High Protein Fried Rice
ingredients: 1/2 Cup Green Onion, Chopped (+ More for Garnish)
steps: Cube the chicken breast and marinate with olive oil, garlic powder, onion powder, black pepper, and soy sauce. Mix until fully coated.
Heat a pan on high, spray with oil, and cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan on medium heat, add mixed vegetables and green onion. Cook for 2–3 minutes, then push to the side. Crack in the eggs, scramble them, then mix everything together.
Add the cooked rice and return the chicken to the pan.
Drizzle over extra soy sauce and sesame oil, optionally spray more oil for that classic fried rice texture, give it a final mix, and serve!

jalal::delicious shawarma bowl.name: Delicious Shawarma Bowl
ingredients: Chopped Cucumber and Tomato mixed with the Garlic Sauce with
Red Onion mixed with Sumac or Lemon
steps: Start by cutting the chicken into cubes. Add all the seasonings listed then mix till well combined and set aside. If the colour doesn’t change you need to add more seasoning.
Make the garlic sauce by adding yogurt, minced garlic, salt, pepper and lemon juice into a blender. Blend till smooth. You can do this in a bowl if preferred.
Make the yellow rice. Add water to a pot then add washed uncooked rice. Add 1/2 tsp turmeric, cumin, paprika and salt. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and let it cook through 10-12 mins.
While that’s cooking, get a pan on medium heat, spray oil then cook the chicken for 4 mins each side till golden brown.
Serve with cooked yellow rice, shredded lettuce, red onion (mixed with pepper or sumac ), pickles, cucumber salad and a generous amount of garlic sauce and ENJOY!

jalal::low calorie burrito bowl.name: Low Calorie Burrito Bowl
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Raw Chicken Breast, cut into cubes
1 Tsp or 1/2 Tsp Red Chilli Flakes
1 Cup Uncooked Basmati Rice (Season with 1 tsp of the Same Spices You Used for the Chicken)
1-2 Tbsp Tomato Paste the green sauce
100g (3.5oz) Fat Free or Low Fat Greek Yogurt (Any Yogurt Works)
20g (1oz) Low Fat Sour Cream or Yogurt
Generous Amount of Green Sauce (About 20g (1oz) Per Serving)
steps: Cube the chicken breast and season with all listed marinade ingredients. Mix well and set aside. Chop the bell peppers and red or white onion.
In a blender cup, add half an avocado, Greek yogurt, coriander, garlic powder, salt, pepper, lime juice, and a little water. Blend until smooth and creamy.
In a pot, add water and washed basmati rice along with the same seasonings used for the chicken and 1–2 tbsp of tomato paste. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 8–10 minutes until cooked.

Heat a pan on high, spray with oil, and cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown. Remove and set aside. In the same pan, cook the chopped peppers and onions for 5 minutes until soft.
Serve with the tomato rice, cooked chicken, sautéed veggies, shredded lettuce, black beans, sweet corn, lime, sour cream or yogurt, and a generous drizzle of the green sauce.

jalal::high protein shawarma.name: High Protein Shawarma
ingredients: 250g (8.8oz) of Raw Chicken Breast Cut Into Strips
400g (14.1oz) Uncooked Potato Cut Into Fries (You Will Only Use 50g, (17oz) Cooked per Wrap)
1 Tsp Salt (At the End After Cooking) sauce
You can toast the wrap in a pan to make it a little crispy and firm
steps: Cut the chicken into strips and season with all the listed spices, tomato paste, and lemon juice. Mix thoroughly to coat the chicken evenly and set aside to marinate.

Preheat the oven to 220°C (430°F). Slice the potato into fries, then toss with cornstarch, paprika, black pepper, and a light spray of cooking oil. Spread the fries out on a lined baking tray and bake for 20 minutes, turning halfway through if needed.

While the fries are in the oven, heat a pan over medium heat, spray with oil, and cook the marinated chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown and cooked through. Avoid overcooking to keep the chicken tender.
In a small bowl, mix together all the ingredients for the garlic sauce until smooth and creamy. Adjust seasoning to taste if needed.

To assemble, take a flatbread and spread a generous layer of garlic sauce . Add a few pieces of cooked chicken, about 50g of fries, and some sliced pickle. Drizzle with more garlic sauce on top, wrap or fold, and enjoy!

jalal::bbq chicken pizza.name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
ingredients: 140g (5oz) Raw Chicken Breast (Seasoned with Salt, Pepper, Paprika and Garlic Powder)
20g (1oz) Frank’s Red Hot Sauce (or Any Hot Sauce You Like)
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F) and place the Lebanese flatbread on a baking tray. In a bowl, mix BBQ sauce with hot sauce and spread a thin, even layer over the flatbread.

Season the chicken breast to your preference, cook in a pan for about 5 minutes on each side until fully cooked, then remove and let it rest for a few minutes. Shred the chicken using two forks and mix it with the remaining BBQ sauce.
Top the flatbread with low-fat mozzarella, the shredded BBQ chicken, and thinly sliced red onion.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and everything is heated through.
Once out of the oven, drizzle with extra BBQ sauce, garnish with chopped spring onion, and enjoy hot!

jalal::delicious chicken stir fry.name: Delicious Chicken Stir Fry
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Raw Chicken Breast, cut into cubes
1.5 Tbsp Soy Sauce (I Used Dark But You Can Use Light) fry
1 Tsp Each of Paprika, Garlic Powder & Pepper (For Seasoning)
steps: Season the chicken with paprika, garlic powder, black pepper, and soy sauce. Mix well until the chicken is evenly coated and its color changes slightly.
Chop all the vegetables, then heat a pan over medium heat and cook the chicken for about 6 minutes until fully cooked. Remove from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add the chopped onions and bell peppers. Season with the same spices and a splash of soy sauce, then sauté for 2–3 minutes until slightly softened.
Add broccoli and cooked rice to the pan. Stir everything together until well combined and heated through, making sure the flavors are evenly distributed.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve hot. Enjoy!

jalal::mexican one pan chicken.name: Mexican One-Pan Chicken
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Raw Chicken Breast, cut into cubes
Use Cooking Spray or Olive Oil
1 Tsp of Each, Salt, Oregano, Cumin, Garlic Powder and
Garnish with Coriander, Green Onion and Some Lime Juice
steps: Cube the chicken breast and season with garlic powder, paprika, oregano, cumin, chili powder, salt, pepper, and lime juice. Mix thoroughly until the color of the chicken changes—this ensures it’s well seasoned.
Heat a pan over high heat, spray with oil, and cook the chicken for 3 minutes. Add chopped onions, bell pepper, and black beans, then cook for an additional minute until slightly softened.
Add washed uncooked rice to the pan along with another sprinkle of the same spices used on the chicken. Stir and toast the rice for 1 minute to enhance its flavor.

Pour in 1 can of chopped tomatoes and add water (enough to cook the rice). Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 12 minutes, stirring once halfway through, until the rice is tender and fully cooked.
Garnish with chopped green onion, fresh coriander, and a squeeze of lime before serving. Enjoy!

jalal::delicious tomato chicken.name: Delicious Tomato Chicken
steps: Cut the chicken breast in half horizontally to create two thinner pieces, then marinate with olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, mixed herbs, salt, and pepper.
Heat a pan over medium heat, spray with oil, and cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on one side until lightly browned.
Flip the chicken, reduce the heat to low, and add chopped tomatoes around the chicken in the pan. Season the tomatoes with garlic powder, mixed herbs, and a pinch of salt.
Add a handful of spinach to the pan, cover with a lid, and let everything simmer on low heat for 8 minutes until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Serve the chicken along with the tomato and spinach sauce over hot rice and enjoy!

jalal::healthy thai green curry.name: Healthy Thai Green Curry
ingredients: 3 Green Chillis (If You Don’t Like it Spicy Then Use 1)
1 Tsp Fish Sauce (Optional) You May Need to Add a Little For It to Blend Properly
300g (10.6oz) Raw Chicken Breast, cut into cubes
2 Tbsp of That Green Curry Paste Made Earlier
Add the Rest of the Green Paste and Toast For 1 min
of Cooked Jasmine Rice Per Serving
steps: In a blender, combine garlic, ginger, shallots, green chilies, fresh coriander, salt, ground cumin, lime juice, and fish sauce. Blend into a smooth paste, adding a little water if needed to help it come together.
Cut the chicken into bite-sized cubes and mix with about 2 tablespoons of the green paste until well coated. Let it marinate for 10–15 minutes while you prepare the rest.
Heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the marinated chicken and cook for about 5 minutes until lightly browned and just cooked through. Remove from the pan and set aside.

In the same pan, add the remaining green paste and cook gently for 1–2 minutes until fragrant. Pour in 300– 400ml of light coconut milk and stir well, letting it simmer for about 5 minutes until the sauce slightly thickens.
Return the cooked chicken to the pan along with sliced green onions and chili pepper. Simmer for another 5 minutes, then serve hot over jasmine rice or any rice of your choice.

jalal::honey sriracha crispy tenders.name: Honey Sriracha Crispy Tenders
ingredients: 1 Tbsp Sriracha or Any Hot Sauce Buttermilk
225 ml (8oz) Low Fat Milk + Lemon Juice (You Want The Milk to Break Apart)
1 Tbsp Honey (You Can Use Low Sugar Alternatives for Lower Calories)
steps: Cut the chicken breast into strips (about 6 per breast) and place them in a bowl. Add all the marinade ingredients, mix well to coat evenly, and let it marinate for as long as possible for maximum flavor.
Preheat the oven to 200°C (390°F). In a separate dish, combine cornflake crumbs with the same spices used in the marinade along with extra paprika. Mix thoroughly to season the coating.
Take each chicken strip from the marinade and press it into the crumb mixture, ensuring each piece is fully coated. Place the coated strips onto a wire rack set over a baking tray.
Bake in the preheated oven for 18 minutes until crispy and cooked through. While the chicken is baking, prepare the glaze by mixing all the glaze ingredients in a bowl until smooth.
Once the chicken tenders are done, coat each piece generously with the glaze. Serve immediately and enjoy!

jalal::creamy rasta pasta.name: Creamy Rasta Pasta
ingredients: 1/2 Cup Pasta Water the cooking process
110g (3.8oz) Uncooked Penne Pasta (Use wholewheat if Possible)
steps: Slice the chicken breast into thin fillets, add a drizzle of olive oil, and season with the listed spices. Mix well until the chicken is evenly coated.
In a blender cup, combine milk, cream cheese, mozzarella, garlic powder, and a bit of pasta water. Blend for about 30 seconds until completely smooth and creamy.

Cook your pasta according to the package instructions. While it cooks, heat a pan over medium heat, spray with oil, and cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side. Once done, remove from the pan and let it rest before cutting into cubes.

In the same pan, add finely chopped garlic and onion. Sauté for 3–4 minutes until softened, then add the bell peppers and cook for another 4 minutes. Pour in the creamy blended sauce and add extra seasoning if needed.
Stir the sauce well and let it thicken slightly. Add the cooked pasta and cubed chicken back into the pan, give everything a final mix, then serve hot and enjoy!

jalal::sesame chicken.name: Sesame Chicken
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Raw Chicken Breast, cut into cubes
1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
steps: Cut the chicken into cubes and season with garlic, soy sauce, Chinese 5 spice, and paprika. Mix thoroughly until the chicken is well coated.
Heat a pan over medium heat, add olive oil or cooking spray, and cook the chicken for about 5 minutes on each side until golden and cooked through. Remove from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add chopped onion and cook until browned. Then add carrots, bell pepper, sweet corn, and the special sauce. Let it cook on low heat until the sauce begins to thicken.
Return the cooked chicken to the pan, mix well, and let it simmer on low heat for another 4–5 minutes to absorb the flavors.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve hot with steamed rice . Enjoy!

jalal::chicken kebabs with yellow rice.name: Chicken Kebabs with Yellow Rice
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Chicken Breast, cut into large cubes
75g (2.7oz) Low Fat Free Yogurt (Can Use Greek Yogurt)
Place Onto 4 Skewers (4-5 Pieces per Skewer) rice
1 Tsp Each, Salt, Pepper, Paprika, Turmeric
steps: Cut the chicken breast into thick cubes and marinate with all the listed ingredients for the chicken. Mix well to coat evenly, then thread the pieces onto 4 skewers, placing 4–5 cubes on each.

Wash the rice and chop the vegetables. Heat a pan over medium heat, add 1 teaspoon of olive oil, and sauté the vegetables for 2 minutes. Add the uncooked rice along with the listed seasonings and toast for 1 minute.

Pour in water, bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 8–10 minutes until the rice is fully cooked. While the rice is cooking, prepare the mint sauce by blending all the sauce ingredients until smooth.
Once the rice is done, set it aside. In the same pan, increase the heat to high, spray with oil , and cook the chicken skewers for 4–5 minutes on each side until golden brown and cooked through.
Serve the chicken skewers over the rice, drizzle generously with the mint sauce, and enjoy!

jalal::power burrito.name: Power Burrito
ingredients: 1 Cup Uncooked Rice (This Will Be More Rice Than Needed)
1 Tsp of All the Same Seasonings You Used For the Chicken
Red Bell Pepper (Cooked After the Chicken)
steps: Season the chicken with olive oil and all the listed spices, ensuring each piece is well coated for maximum flavour.

In a pan over medium heat, spray with oil and add black beans, rice, the same seasonings, and 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer and cook for 8–10 minutes until the rice is fully done. Remove from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, cook the chicken over medium-high heat for about 5 minutes on each side until golden and cooked through. Let it rest for 2–3 minutes before cutting into small pieces.
Lay out a tortilla wrap and add a layer of rice , followed by the chopped chicken, cheese, sliced peppers, avocado, and jalapeños.
Fold the wrap into a burrito, then lightly toast it in the pan or a sandwich press until golden and sealed. Serve warm and enjoy!

jalal::one pot chicken parm.name: One-Pot Chicken Parm
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Chicken Breast, cut in half (4 pieces)
1 Tsp Garlic Powder + Extra for Sauce
1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
steps: Cut the chicken breasts in half to create thinner pieces. In a bowl, mix together parmesan, paprika, oregano, garlic powder, and salt. Use this mixture to thoroughly coat each piece of chicken.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat, spray with oil, and cook the chicken for 4 minutes on one side. Flip the chicken, immediately lower the heat, and add chopped tomatoes around the chicken in the pan.
Season the tomatoes with oregano, garlic powder, and salt, then place mozzarella on top of each chicken piece. Cover the pan and let it cook for 2–3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
Once the cheese has melted and the chicken is fully cooked, remove from the heat and let it rest for a minute.
Serve the chicken over rice or your favorite carb source—this also pairs perfectly with some warm bread. Enjoy!

jalal::juicy chicken burger.name: Juicy Chicken Burger
ingredients: 1 Tbsp Sriracha or Any Hot Sauce of Your Choice
Spicy Mayo (1 Tsp Hot sauce + 1 Tbsp Light Mayo)
1 Light Mozzarella Slice or Any Other Light Cheese
steps: Marinate the chicken with light mayo, sriracha or your preferred hot sauce, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, salt, and pepper. Mix thoroughly until the chicken is evenly coated.

Heat a pan over medium-high heat and cook the chicken for 3–4 minutes on each side, or 5 minutes if the pieces are thicker. Once cooked, let the chicken rest for 5 minutes to allow the juices to absorb.
While the chicken rests, lightly toast the burger buns until golden and warm.
To assemble, spread a layer of spicy mayo on the bottom bun, add the juicy piece of chicken, then layer on slices of tomato, pickled red onion, lettuce, and cheese.
Place the top bun on, press gently, and enjoy your spicy chicken sandwich!

jalal::loaded nachos.name: Loaded Nachos
ingredients: 2 Low Calorie Tortilla Wraps Cut Into Triangles
1 Light Mozzarella Slice or Any Other Light Cheese
30g (1.1oz) Low Fat Shredded Mozzarella or Any Other Cheese
Fat Free Sour Cream or Yogurt
steps: Take 2 tortilla wraps and cut them into triangle-shaped pieces using a knife. Place the pieces on a baking tray, spray with oil, and season with salt, garlic powder, parsley, and chili flakes. Bake at 180°C (350°F) for 5 minutes until crisp.

Cut the chicken breast in half, then rub with olive oil, salt, chili powder, paprika, parsley, garlic powder, and cumin until fully coated. Cook over medium heat for 4 minutes on each side, then shred the chicken once cooked.
In a bowl, combine chopped tomato, red onion, avocado, and coriander. Season with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lime juice, then mix everything together to make a fresh salsa.
Layer the baked tortilla chips with shredded chicken and grated cheese. Return to the oven and bake for 3–4 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and top with the fresh salsa and a dollop of sour cream or yogurt . Serve immediately and enjoy!

jalal::juicy tender whole chicken.name: Juicy & Tender Whole Chicken
ingredients: 1 Whole Chicken (2 Breasts & 2 Thighs) You Can Use 4 Boneless Chicken Breasts
1-2 Tbsp Sriracha (Depends How Spicy You Want It)
1 Tbsp Soy Sauce (Dark or Low Sodium)
steps: Place your whole chicken or boneless chicken breast in a large bowl, add all the marinade ingredients, and mix thoroughly until the chicken is fully coated. Let it marinate for as long as possible—the longer it rests, the more flavorful it will be.
Preheat your oven to 220°C (430°F). Prepare a baking tray by spreading a layer of sliced bell peppers and onions (or any vegetables of your choice) to act as a base.
Arrange the marinated chicken pieces over the vegetables and season the top with salt, chili flakes, and parsley. Cover the tray tightly with foil.
Bake in the oven for 20 minutes at 220°C, then remove the foil and return the tray to the oven. Broil for an additional 5–7 minutes to develop a golden, slightly charred color on the chicken.
Once done, baste the chicken with the flavorful juices from the tray and serve with your favorite carbs like roasted potatoes or rice. Enjoy!

jalal::honey chicken rice.name: Honey Chicken & Rice
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) Chicken Breast, cut into bite size pieces
steps: Chop the chicken into bite-sized pieces and season with soy sauce, garlic powder, paprika, and the juice of half a lemon. Mix well until the chicken is evenly coated.
Heat a pan over medium heat, spray with oil, and add the chicken. Cook for about 2 minutes on each side until lightly browned.
Turn off the heat, drizzle in the honey, and toss the chicken until fully coated. Transfer to a plate and set aside.
Dice the bell pepper and add it to the same pan along with the spinach. Cover and cook until the vegetables are softened.
Add the chicken back into the pan along with cooked rice, and adjust the flavor with more honey, soy sauce, and lemon juice to taste. Mix well and serve hot!

jalal::thin crust pizza.name: Thin Crust Pizza
ingredients: Thin Crust Lebanese Flatbread (You Can Use Wholemeal Wraps Too)
steps: Cut the chicken breast into small bite-sized pieces and season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika. Mix well to evenly coat, then cook over high heat for 5 minutes until golden. Set aside once cooked.
Place a flatbread on a pizza tray and spread a thin, even layer of tomato paste over the surface.
Top the flatbread with mozzarella, the cooked chicken pieces, sliced red onion, bell pepper, cherry tomatoes, and a generous sprinkle of Italian herbs.
Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C (350°F) for 10 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and serve immediately. It’s light enough to enjoy the whole pizza yourself—enjoy!

jalal::lean stuffed peppers.name: Lean Stuffed Peppers
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) 2 Chicken Breast, cut into small pieces
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces and place in a bowl. Add salt, pepper, olive oil, garlic, and paprika, then mix thoroughly until well coated. Set aside to marinate briefly.
Heat a pan on high, spray with oil, then add chopped onions and courgette/zucchini. Season with the same spices as the chicken and cook for 5 minutes until slightly softened. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, add the marinated chicken and cook for about 5 minutes until golden brown. Add the cooked vegetables back in, mix everything together, then turn off the heat.
Slice bell peppers in half, remove the seeds, and place them on a lined baking tray. Fill each pepper with the chicken and veggie mixture, then bake at 180°C (350°F) for 15 minutes.
Remove the tray, top each pepper with jalapeños and low-fat cheese, and return to the oven for another 5 minutes until the cheese is melted. Serve hot and enjoy!

jalal::one pot chicken rice.name: One Pot Chicken & Rice
ingredients: 300g (10.6oz) 2 Chicken Breast, cut through the middle
steps: Butterfly cut your chicken breasts and season generously with Cajun seasoning. Add olive oil and rub until both sides are evenly coated.
Heat a pan over high heat, add the chicken, and cook for 5 minutes. Flip the chicken, then immediately lower the heat.
Add diced onion, bell pepper, chili pepper, uncooked rice, and 1.5 to 2 cups of water to the pan. Season again with Cajun seasoning for extra flavour.
Cover the pan and let it simmer for 10–12 minutes. At the 6-minute mark, uncover and stir the rice to prevent sticking and ensure even cooking.
Once the rice is fully cooked and the chicken is tender, remove from heat and serve hot. Enjoy!

jalal::high protein pizza bites.name: High Protein Pizza Bites
ingredients: 50-60g (2.1oz) Low Fat Mozzarella (or Any Shredded Cheese)
steps: Cut the chicken breast in half and marinate with olive oil, salt, garlic powder, and Italian herbs. While it marinates, finely chop the red onion, bell pepper, and tomato.
Cook the chicken over medium-high heat for 4 minutes on each side until fully cooked. Remove from the pan and shred using two forks or a knife.
Arrange 6 rice cakes on a baking tray. Spread a thin layer of tomato paste on each one, then top with shredded mozzarella, the cooked chicken, and chopped veggies.
Sprinkle extra Italian herbs and a pinch of salt over the top for added flavour.
Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C (350°F) for 8 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbling. Serve hot and enjoy immediately!

jalal::cheesy beef bolognese tacos.name: Cheesy Beef Bolognese Tacos
ingredients: 400g (14.1oz) Lean Ground/Minced Beef (I Use Topside Beef)
steps: Dice the onion and grate the carrots. Heat a pan over medium heat, add olive oil, then sauté the onion and carrots with salt, pepper, and tomato paste. Mix well and cook for 5 minutes until softened.
Add the lean ground beef along with oregano, garlic powder, and smoked paprika. Break it up with a spoon, mix thoroughly, and cook for 5–8 minutes until browned.
Pour in the chopped tomatoes, stir to combine, and let the mixture simmer for 4–5 minutes to deepen the flavour.
Heat a second pan. Dip each taco shell briefly into the meat mixture to coat, then place onto the second pan to grill.
Fill each taco with the beef mixture and mozzarella, toast on both sides until golden and crispy, then garnish with grated parmesan and chopped parsley. Serve hot and enjoy!

jalal::in n out double double cheeseburg.name: In N Out Double Double Cheeseburgers
ingredients: 4 Slices of Low Fat American Cheese
steps: Divide the beef into four equal 100g balls, season each with salt and pepper, and place them in the fridge to firm up while you prepare the other ingredients.
Thinly slice the onion and lettuce, and cut the tomato into slices. Set all the vegetables aside for assembling the burgers later.
In a bowl, mix together all the ingredients for the special sauce until smooth and well combined. Set the sauce aside.
Remove the beef from the fridge and heat a pan on high. Add a little light butter, place two beef balls in the pan, and use the back of a wide spatula to smash each one flat.

Cook the patties for 2–3 minutes, then flip them and add a slice of American cheese to each. Cook for another 2 minutes, then turn off the heat, splash in a bit of water, and cover with a lid to melt the cheese.
Toast the burger buns, spread the special sauce on both sides, and assemble with lettuce, a tomato slice, one cheesy patty, sliced onion , a second patty, and the top bun. Serve hot and enjoy!

jalal::chinese beef stir fry.name: Chinese Beef Stir Fry
ingredients: 400g (14.1oz) Topside Beef Cut Into Thin Strips
20g (1oz) Soy Sauce (Mix Light and Dark Soy Sauce)
1 Tsp Baking Soda (Optional But Helps Tenderise the Meat)
240g (8.4oz) Cooked White Rice (120g (4.2oz) Rice per Serving)
steps: Thinly slice the beef and place it in a bowl with soy sauce, black pepper, garlic powder, and a pinch of baking soda. Mix well to coat evenly, then set aside to marinate.
In a separate bowl, prepare the sticky sauce by mixing soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, water, garlic powder, and sesame seeds until fully combined.
Heat a pan over medium heat, add cooking spray or olive oil, and cook the marinated beef for about 3 minutes on each side until browned and slightly charred. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, add sliced bell peppers and cook for 5 minutes until soft. Pour in the sauce and let it bubble gently to thicken.
Return the cooked beef to the pan along with chopped green onion . Stir everything together until well coated, garnish with sesame seeds , and serve hot with rice . Enjoy!

jalal::high protein creamy beef pasta.name: High Protein Creamy Beef Pasta
ingredients: 120g (4.2oz) Uncooked Fusilli Pasta (Or Any Other Type of Pasta)
steps: Boil water in a pot, add a teaspoon of salt, then cook the pasta for 8–10 minutes. Before draining, reserve ½ cup of the pasta water, then drain and set the pasta aside.

In a pan over medium heat, add olive oil and garlic cloves. Cook for 1 minute, then add chopped bell pepper and tomato. Season with salt, pepper, Italian herbs, and paprika. Cook for 5 minutes until softened.
Transfer the cooked vegetables to a blender along with the reserved pasta water and cream cheese. Blend until smooth and creamy, about 1 minute.
In the same pan, cook the beef over medium heat for 5 minutes. Season with salt, pepper, Italian herbs, and paprika as before.
Once the beef is cooked, add the drained pasta and blended sauce. Stir everything together, let it simmer for a few minutes, then top with grated parmesan and enjoy!

jalal::high protein lasagna.name: High Protein Lasagna
ingredients: 500g (17.6oz) Lean Ground Beef (I Use Topside Beef)
140ml (5oz) Beef Stock (I Used an OXO Beef Cube)
1 Tsp Garlic Powder, Italian Herbs & Salt the lasagna layers
210g (7.4oz) Uncooked Lasagna Sheets / 390g (13.7oz) Cooked Lasagna Sheets
steps: Start by making the Béchamel sauce—combine all the listed ingredients in a blender cup and blend until smooth and creamy, then set aside.

In a pan over medium heat, add olive oil, chopped onion, grated carrot, salt, pepper, and tomato paste. Cook for 5 minutes, then add the ground beef and smoked paprika, cooking for another 5 minutes while breaking up the beef.

Add beef stock or water, canned tomatoes, garlic powder, Italian herbs, and salt to the pan. Mix well, stir in some basil leaves, cover, and let simmer for 10–15 minutes. Meanwhile, boil your lasagna sheets for about 6 minutes until al dente.
In a baking dish, start layering in this order: meat mixture, lasagna sheets , then Béchamel sauce . Repeat the process two more times.
Top with shredded mozzarella and bake at 180°C for 25–30 minutes. Once golden and bubbly, remove from the oven and serve hot—enjoy!

jalal::healthy spaghetti bolognese.name: Healthy Spaghetti Bolognese
ingredients: 1 Cup Pasta Water I recommend cooking the when the beef is left on
week! TAP ICONS FOR RECIPE VIDEO
Add 1/2 Cup Pasta Water, Cover and Simmer For 8-10 mins
Garnish with Parmesan & Basil (30g (1.1oz) Parmesan per Serving)
steps: Dice the onion, carrots, celery, and garlic into small pieces and set aside. These will be used as the base of the sauce.
Heat some olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook briefly, then add the onion, celery, and carrots. Sauté until soft and lightly golden.
