Move the vegetables to the side and add the ground beef. Break it up and cook until browned. Stir in tomato paste, canned tomatoes, and your seasonings like garlic powder, Italian herbs, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Meanwhile, cook spaghetti in salted boiling water. Before draining, save a bit of the pasta water for later.
Add the pasta water to the beef mixture and toss in a few basil leaves if you like. Stir everything together, cover, and let it simmer on low heat so the flavors can come together.
Serve the spaghetti topped with the beef sauce. Garnish with grated parmesan and fresh basil, then enjoy!

jalal::one pan tomato beef pasta.name: One-Pan Tomato Beef Pasta
steps: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add ground beef and chopped onions, then season with garlic powder, salt, pepper, Italian herbs, and Worcestershire sauce. Cook until the beef is browned.
Add pasta sauce or canned tomatoes, chopped bell peppers, water, and uncooked pasta directly into the pan.
Stir everything together, then add more seasoning if needed.
Cover the pan and let it simmer for 15–18 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Once the pasta is fully cooked and the sauce has thickened, garnish with parsley and a sprinkle of mozzarella if desired. Serve and enjoy!

jalal::beefy pasta.name: Beefy Pasta
steps: Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook until tender. Reserve some pasta water before draining, then set the pasta aside.

In a pan over medium heat, add olive oil and whole garlic cloves. Cook until fragrant and lightly golden. Add chopped bell pepper and tomato, then season with salt, pepper, Italian herbs, and chili flakes. Sauté until softened.
Transfer the cooked vegetables and garlic to a blender. Add the reserved pasta water and cream cheese. Blend until the sauce is smooth and creamy.
In the same pan, cook the ground beef over medium heat. Season with salt, pepper, Italian herbs, and paprika. Cook for about 5 minutes or until browned.
Add the cooked pasta and creamy sauce to the pan with the beef. Stir everything together and let it simmer for a couple of minutes. Finish with a sprinkle of parmesan cheese and serve warm.

jalal::mongolian beef.name: Mongolian Beef
ingredients: 1/2 Tsp Baking Soda (This is Very Important to Make the Beef Really Tender!)
1 Tsp White Pepper or Black Pepper
1 Tbsp Oyster Sauce (You Can Replace with Low Sugar Ketchup)
1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
Green Onion/Scallion, Cut Into Long Pieces
steps: Slice the steak into thin strips, ideally cutting on a diagonal for tenderness. Marinate the beef with olive oil, soy sauce, rice vinegar, baking soda, cornstarch, and white pepper. Mix well and let it sit while you prepare the other ingredients.
Chop your vegetables, then prepare the stir-fry sauce in a bowl by mixing soy sauce, oyster sauce, rice vinegar, water, and cornstarch until smooth.
Heat a pan on high and spray with oil. Add the marinated beef in batches, cooking 1–2 minutes per side until browned. Avoid overcrowding the pan. Remove and set aside.

In the same pan, add a small amount of olive oil, followed by garlic, ginger, red chilli, and green onion. Stir- fry for 2–3 minutes until fragrant, then pour in the prepared sauce. Let it cook for another minute or so until it thickens.
Return the beef to the pan, toss everything together until well coated, and serve with hot jasmine rice. Garnish with sesame seeds and extra green onion, then enjoy!

jalal::steak stir fry.name: Steak Stir Fry
ingredients: 200g (7.1oz) Lean Beef Steak, cut into thin strips
1 Tbsp Garlic Powder or Fresh Garlic, Chopped
1 Tbsp Ginger Powder or Fresh Ginger, Crushed
steps: Slice the steaks into thin strips and place in a bowl. Marinate with soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, black pepper, garlic, and ginger. Mix well and let it sit for a few minutes while prepping other ingredients.

Heat a pan over medium heat and add a bit of olive oil. Add diced carrots, broccoli, bell pepper, and cashews. Season with soy sauce and Worcestershire sauce, then cook for about 5 minutes until the vegetables are slightly soft. Remove from the pan and set aside.
Increase the heat to high and cook the marinated beef in the same pan. Let it sear for about 5 minutes until browned and most of the liquid has evaporated.
Once the beef is browned, return the cooked vegetables to the pan. Mix everything together and let it simmer for a minute so the flavors combine.
Serve hot with steamed rice and enjoy!

jalal::double smash burger.name: Double Smash Burger
steps: Take your lean beef mince and shape it into two equal-sized balls. Lightly season a plate with salt and pepper, then roll the meatballs in it to coat.

Heat a grill or non-stick pan over high heat. Add a small piece of butter, then place the meatballs in the pan. Use a spatula to smash them into patties and add sliced onion to the pan beside them. Cook for about 2 minutes, then flip everything.
Lower the heat, place a slice of cheese on one of the patties, and stack the other patty on top. Toast your burger buns in the same pan until golden.
Mix mustard, sriracha, and light mayo in a bowl to make the sauce. Spread the sauce generously on both sides of the buns.
Assemble the burger in this order: lettuce, the double-stacked patties, tomato slice, grilled onion, and gherkin slices. Serve and enjoy!

jalal::high protein kebab.name: High Protein Kebab
steps: In a bowl combine ground beef with minced garlic, your preferred spices, and chopped coriander. Mix thoroughly until everything is well incorporated.
Place the mixture in the fridge for about 10 minutes to help the meat firm up and hold its shape better.
Shape the meat into kebab-style pieces and bake in a preheated oven for around 10 minutes. Be careful not to overcook them, as they can dry out.
While the kebabs are cooking, prepare your flatbread by getting lettuce, sliced tomato, and red onion ready. Also, mix your white sauce if you haven’t already.
Once cooked, place three kebabs onto each flatbread, add the veggies, drizzle with white sauce and sriracha, then wrap it up and enjoy!

jalal::loaded fries.name: Loaded Fries!
ingredients: 1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
steps: Cut your potatoes into fry-shaped pieces. Toss them in olive oil, salt, and paprika, then spread them out evenly on a lined baking tray.
Bake in a preheated oven at 220°C for about 15–20 minutes, or until crispy and golden, flipping halfway through if needed.
While the fries are baking, cook your ground beef in a pan with chopped onions and bell pepper. Season with salt, cumin, garlic powder, paprika, oregano, and a splash of Worcestershire sauce.
Once the beef is nicely browned, sprinkle some low-fat cheese over the top and let it melt.
When everything is ready, plate the fries, top with the cheesy beef, then finish with jalapeños and spicy sauce. Enjoy!

jalal::crispy salmon fried rice.name: Crispy Salmon Fried Rice
ingredients: 700g (24.7oz) Skinless Raw Salmon, cut into cubes
15-20ml (1oz) Light Soy Sauce (Can Mix Light and Dark Soy Sauce)
1 Tsp Olive Oil for Cooking or Cooking Spray
steps: Slice skinless salmon into bite-sized cubes. Season with garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, black pepper, soy sauce, and a little cornflour. Mix until evenly coated.
Heat a pan over medium heat, spray lightly with oil, and cook the salmon pieces for 2–3 minutes until golden and crispy. Cook in batches if needed, then set aside.
In the same pan, add mixed vegetables and cook for a couple of minutes. Push to one side, crack in the eggs, and stir continuously until scrambled, then mix everything together.
Add cooked rice along with a bit more soy sauce and oyster sauce. Stir well to combine and heat through. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Finally, add the crispy salmon back in, top with a drizzle of spicy lemon mayo, and enjoy!

jalal::low calorie shrimp tacos.name: Low Calorie Shrimp Tacos
ingredients: Pinch of Salt, Pepper, Garlic Powder & Chilli Flakes
1/2 Red, Green and Yellow Bell Pepper, Finely Chopped
Pinch of Salt, Pepper, Paprika and Lime Juice
About 8 Pieces of Shrimp Per Taco Salsa
3 Thin Slices of Avocado Per Taco
steps: Season your shrimp with paprika, garlic powder, cumin, salt, pepper, lime juice, and a bit of olive oil. Mix everything thoroughly to coat the shrimp evenly, then set aside to marinate while you prepare the sauce.

In a blender, add fresh mango, plain yogurt, a pinch of salt and pepper, garlic powder, chilli flakes, and a squeeze of lime juice. Blend until smooth and creamy. Adjust the seasoning to taste, then set the sauce aside.

Heat a pan over medium-high heat and lightly spray with oil. Add the shrimp in a single layer and cook for 2–3 minutes on each side until golden brown and cooked through. Remove from the pan and set aside. In a bowl, prepare the salsa.
Toast your mini tortillas over the stove flame for a few seconds on each side until lightly charred or warm.

Assemble the tacos, lay the shrimp on each tortilla, spoon over the salsa, add a few slices of avocado, and drizzle a generous amount of the mango sauce on top. Garnish with fresh coriander and serve immediately. Enjoy!

jalal::salmon power bowl.name: Salmon Power Bowl
ingredients: 1/4 Tsp Chilli Flakes or Paprika (Depends If You Want It Spicy)
1 Tsp Rice Vinegar or Lemon Juice with
Spicy Lemon Mayo (Light Mayo, Sriracha & Lemon Juice)
steps: Slice your skinless salmon into bite-sized cubes. Add your seasonings, garlic powder, paprika or chilli flakes, soy sauce, and a touch of oil—then mix until the salmon is evenly coated. Set aside while you prepare the rest.

Thinly slice your red onion and carrot, then make a quick cucumber salad by combining sliced cucumber with soy sauce, garlic powder, chilli flakes or paprika, and a splash of rice vinegar. Stir well and let it sit to marinate.

Rinse your jasmine rice thoroughly, then cook it in boiling water until fluffy. While the rice cooks, heat a pan on medium heat with a bit of oil and sear the salmon cubes for 2–3 minutes on each side until golden and slightly crisp on the edges.
Prepare your toppings: slice avocado, and if using, mix up a spicy lemon mayo by combining light mayo with a bit of hot sauce and lemon juice.

Assemble your bowl with a portion of rice, cooked salmon, cucumber salad, sliced onion, carrot, and avocado. Drizzle over the spicy lemon mayo and top with sesame seeds and chopped green onion if you like. Serve and enjoy!

jalal::honey garlic shrimp stir fry.name: Honey Garlic Shrimp Stir Fry
ingredients: 1-2 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
steps: Season the shrimp with minced garlic, smoked paprika, pepper, chilli flakes, honey, lemon juice, and soy sauce. Mix until everything is well combined, then set aside to marinate.

Thinly slice the onion, bell peppers, and broccoli. Heat a pan on medium heat with a little olive oil, then cook the shrimp for about 2 minutes on each side until golden and pink. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, add the sliced vegetables and cook for 3–4 minutes until they begin to soften.
Push the veggies to the side and add a bit more garlic, honey, and soy sauce in the middle. Let it bubble and caramelise for a minute, then mix everything together.
Add cooked basmati rice (about one portion) and stir to combine well. Return the shrimp to the pan, toss everything together, sprinkle sesame seeds on top and enjoy!

jalal::creamy shrimp pasta.name: Creamy Shrimp Pasta
ingredients: 120-130g (4.6oz) Uncooked Linguine (or Any Pasta of Choice)
steps: Rinse and pat dry the shrimp, then place in a bowl. Add minced fresh garlic, Italian herbs, paprika, salt, pepper, chilli flakes, and a splash of lemon juice. Mix until the shrimp are evenly coated, then set aside to marinate briefly.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add olive oil or cooking spray. Once hot, add the shrimp and cook for 3–4 minutes, flipping halfway, until golden and fully cooked. Remove from the pan and set aside.

Reduce the heat to low. In the same pan, pour in a bit of milk and add cream cheese, grated parmesan, Italian herbs, garlic powder, and a splash of reserved pasta water. Stir continuously until the mixture melts and forms a smooth, creamy sauce.
Add a handful of fresh spinach, then return the cooked shrimp to the pan along with your pre-cooked pasta. Toss everything together until well combined and the spinach wilts.
Once the dish is evenly heated and coated in the sauce, serve immediately. Optionally garnish with extra parmesan or herbs.

jalal::creamy salmon pasta.name: Creamy Salmon Pasta
steps: Fill a large pot with water and bring it to a boil. Add salt, then stir in the pasta. Cook for 8–10 minutes until al dente. Before draining, reserve about ½ cup of pasta water. Drain the pasta and set aside.

In a hot pan, lightly spray with oil and add garlic cloves, sun-dried tomatoes, and chopped onion. Season with salt, pepper, and Italian herbs. Sauté for about 5 minutes until the onions are soft and fragrant.
Transfer the sautéed mixture to a blender. Add the reserved pasta water, cream cheese, and a splash of almond or low-fat milk. Blend for 1–2 minutes until smooth and creamy.
Season salmon fillets with salt and pepper. Heat a pan over medium-high heat with a little oil or spray. Cook the salmon for about 6 minutes per side until golden and cooked through. Set aside.
Lower the heat and return the pasta to the pan. Pour in the sauce and stir to coat evenly. Place the salmon on top, cover briefly to warm everything through, then serve immediately.

jalal::honey salmon rice.name: Honey Salmon & Rice
steps: In a bowl, combine all the marinade ingredients and mix thoroughly until smooth and well blended.
Preheat your oven to 220°C (430°F). Line a baking tray with parchment paper and place the salmon fillets on top. Spoon the marinade evenly over each piece, spreading it to coat fully.
Switch your oven setting to broil. Place the salmon in the oven and broil for 6–10 minutes, depending on thickness. Keep an eye on it to avoid overcooking.
While the salmon cooks, stir-fry your choice of vegetables in a hot pan, or roast them alongside the salmon in the oven if you prefer.
Once everything is ready, plate the salmon with your veggies and a portion of jasmine rice. Serve immediately and enjoy!

jalal::tuna stir fry.name: Tuna Stir Fry
ingredients: 2 Cans of Tuna (110g (3.8oz) Drained Weight per Can)
1 Cup of Cooked Rice (Can easily adjust this depending on your calorie goals)
Sesame Seeds & Spring Onion, for Garnish (Optional)
steps: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add a small amount of olive oil. Once hot, add your chopped vegetables (like bell peppers, carrots, or onions) along with your spices of choice — garlic powder, black pepper, and a pinch of chili flakes work great. Sauté everything for about 2 minutes until the veggies start to soften.
Add in the canned tuna and stir it through the veggies, letting it cook for another 2 minutes to warm up and absorb the flavors.

Next, add your cooked rice followed by soy sauce and oyster sauce. Mix everything together thoroughly to coat the rice and tuna in the sauces. Let it cook for another 2 minutes so the flavors blend well.
Finish by sprinkling over some sesame seeds and freshly chopped spring onion. Serve warm and enjoy your quick and flavorful tuna fried rice!

jalal::fresh salmon bowl.name: Fresh Salmon Bowl
ingredients: Spring Onion and Sesame Seeds, for Garnish
steps: Cut the salmon into bite-sized cubes and prepare your marinade by mixing your preferred ingredients. Coat the salmon evenly with the marinade and let it sit briefly to absorb the flavors.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add a little oil or cooking spray. Cook the salmon cubes for about 2 minutes on each side until golden and just cooked through. Set aside.
In a large serving bowl, start by adding your cooked rice as the base.
Arrange the cooked salmon along with the avocado, cucumber, edamame, mango, and carrots, and place evenly around the rice.
Drizzle some extra dressing over the top and sprinkle with sesame seeds. Serve immediately and enjoy!

jalal::tuna pasta bake.name: Tuna Pasta Bake
ingredients: 1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
steps: Cook the pasta according to the package instructions. While it’s cooking, dice the onion and bell pepper, and finely chop the garlic.
In a pan, heat a bit of olive oil over medium heat. Add the onion, garlic, bell pepper, and chopped tomatoes. Season with salt, pepper, Italian herbs, and chilli flakes.
Stir and cook for about 5 minutes until the vegetables soften. Stir in the tuna and the cooked pasta. Mix everything well, then transfer to a baking dish.
Top with shredded mozzarella and bake in a preheated oven at 180ºC for 10 minutes. Remove from the oven and serve hot—enjoy!

jalal::fresh shrimp salad.name: Fresh Shrimp Salad
ingredients: Mixed Salad Greens (your choice of salad)
steps: Add the shrimp to a mixing bowl and season with salt, garlic powder, paprika, chilli flakes, and freshly squeezed lemon juice. Toss thoroughly so the seasoning coats each piece evenly. Set aside to briefly marinate while you prep the rest.

Slice the cherry tomatoes in halves, thinly slice the red onion, and cube or slice the avocado. In a large salad bowl, add a base of fresh salad greens, then top with the prepared tomatoes, onion, avocado, and a handful of blueberries.
For the dressing (optional but recommended), whisk together honey mustard, a pinch of salt and pepper, garlic powder, and a bit more lemon juice until well combined and creamy.

Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and cook the marinated shrimp for 2–3 minutes on each side until golden and cooked through. Add the shrimp to the salad , drizzle generously with the dressing , and serve immediately— fresh, zesty, and full of flavour!

jalal::garlic parmesan fries.name: Garlic Parmesan Fries
ingredients: 250g (8.8oz) Raw Potato, cut into thin fries
1 Tbsp Garlic Powder or Fresh Garlic
1-2 Tbsp Fat Free Greek Yogurt (creamier the better)
steps: Slice the potatoes into thin, even fries. Place them in a large bowl and season with garlic powder, oregano, black pepper, grated parmesan cheese, and cornflour. Lightly spray with cooking spray and toss everything together until the fries are evenly coated.

Preheat your oven to 220°C (425°F). Spread the fries out in a single layer on a lined baking tray, ensuring they’re not overlapping. Bake for 25–30 minutes, flipping halfway through, until crispy and golden. Alternatively, cook in an air fryer at 220°C for 12–14 minutes, shaking halfway.
Once the fries are cooked, immediately sprinkle with salt, a bit more parmesan, and some freshly chopped parsley for extra flavour and a pop of colour.

For the dipping sauce, combine light mayonnaise, fat-free yogurt, crushed or finely minced garlic, paprika, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl. Stir until smooth. Serve the fries hot with the sauce on the side—enjoy!

jalal::low calorie crispy fries.name: Low Calorie Crispy Fries
steps: Wash the potatoes thoroughly and cut them into thin, even fries. Spread them out on a lined baking tray. Season generously with smoked paprika, black pepper, garlic powder, and a dusting of cornstarch. Toss well to ensure all the fries are evenly coated.
Preheat your oven to 220°C (430°F). Once heated, bake the fries for 20–23 minutes or until golden and crispy, flipping them halfway through for even browning.
While the fries are baking, prepare your dipping sauce of choice. Once the fries are out of the oven, sprinkle with salt while still hot and serve immediately with the sauce—enjoy!

jalal::golden yellow rice.name: Golden Yellow Rice
ingredients: 420ml (14.7oz) Water or Chicken Broth (for more flavour)
steps: Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the chopped onions, carrots, and red bell pepper. Sauté for 3–4 minutes until the vegetables begin to soften and the onions turn translucent.

Push the vegetables to the sides to make a well in the center of the pan. Add the washed, uncooked rice into the well. Season with salt, black pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and turmeric. Stir to evenly coat the rice in the spices and let it toast for 2–3 minutes, allowing the flavors to infuse.

Pour in water or chicken broth, just enough to cover the rice. Stir everything together, then bring the mixture to a light boil. Once boiling, reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and let it simmer for 8–10 minutes until the rice is fully cooked. Stir gently halfway through to prevent sticking and ensure even cooking.
Once the rice is tender and the liquid absorbed, fluff it gently. Serve warm with your favorite protein—like grilled chicken or fish—and garnish with fresh parsley or coriander. Enjoy!

jalal::spicy creamy breakfast wraps.name: Spicy Creamy Breakfast Wraps
ingredients: 6 Boiled Eggs (keep 3 Egg Yolks and 6 whites)
steps: Bring a pot of water to a gentle boil and carefully add 6 eggs. Boil for 8 minutes, then immediately transfer the eggs to a bowl of cold water to cool. Once cooled, peel the eggs and separate the yolks from the whites into two separate bowls.

Mash the egg yolks until smooth, then add a spoonful of Greek yogurt or light mayo, a squeeze of mustard (optional), salt, pepper, and a pinch of paprika. Mix until it becomes a creamy, well-seasoned base.
Finely chop the egg whites and add them to the yolk mixture. Stir thoroughly to combine into a cohesive, creamy egg salad.

Lay out your tortilla wrap of choice. Add a layer of shredded lettuce, a generous spoonful of the egg salad, a sprinkle of grated cheese, and a touch of fresh parsley. Fold the wrap, toast it in a pan on medium heat until golden and warm, then slice and enjoy!

jalal::crispy potatoes scrambled eggs.name: Crispy Potatoes & Scrambled Eggs
ingredients: 250g (8.8oz) Raw Potatoes, cut into little cubes
steps: Start by slicing your potatoes into small, evenly sized cubes. Transfer them to a bowl and season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and oregano. Microwave the seasoned potatoes for 4–5 minutes until they become soft and partially cooked.

Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add a bit of olive oil or cooking spray. Add the microwaved potatoes and cook for about 4 minutes until they begin to turn golden. Then sprinkle in 1 teaspoon of paprika and continue cooking for another 4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they’re crispy and golden brown.
While the potatoes are finishing up, prepare your scrambled eggs. Crack your eggs into a bowl, whisk well, then pour into a pan over low heat. Stir gently and continuously for soft, fluffy eggs.

To serve, plate the crispy potatoes and fluffy eggs together. Drizzle with spicy mayo , season the eggs with salt, pepper, and chili flakes , and garnish with fresh parsley . Enjoy your hearty, flavour-packed breakfast!

jalal::cheesecake french toast.name: Cheesecake French Toast
steps: In a wide bowl or shallow dish, crack in the whole eggs and egg whites. Add milk, vanilla extract, and a dash of cinnamon. Whisk everything together thoroughly until the mixture is smooth and slightly frothy.
Dip each slice of bread into the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly without soaking too long. Set the soaked slices aside on a plate, ready to cook.
In a separate bowl, combine softened cream cheese, finely chopped strawberries, and a spoonful of strawberry jam. Mix until well blended into a creamy, fruity filling.

Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and lightly coat with cooking spray or a bit of olive oil. Cook each slice of soaked bread for about 2 minutes per side, or until golden brown and slightly crispy.

To assemble, place one slice of the cooked French toast on a plate, spread a layer of the strawberry cream mixture, top with fresh strawberry slices, then place another slice on top. Add more cream, extra berries, and a dusting of powdered sugar. Serve warm and enjoy!

jalal::high protein egg sandwich.name: High Protein Egg Sandwich
ingredients: 7.5g FAT TAP ICONS FOR RECIPE VIDEO
steps: Begin by boiling your eggs for 8 minutes until hard-boiled. Once done, cool them under cold water, peel carefully, and separate the yolks from the whites.
In a bowl, place 2 of the yolks and add low-fat cream cheese. Season with salt, pepper, onion powder, paprika, and finely chopped green onion. Mix everything together until smooth and creamy.
Chop the remaining egg whites into small pieces and fold them into the creamy yolk mixture. Stir until everything is evenly combined.

Toast 4 slices of wholemeal bread to your preferred crispiness. Assemble each slice with a layer of fresh lettuce, a generous spoonful of the egg mix, and finish with a sprinkle of chilli flakes and chopped parsley. Serve and enjoy!

jalal::breakfast wrap.name: Breakfast Wrap
ingredients: Spicy Mayo (mix Sriracha Light Mayo and Lemon Juice)
steps: Place a non-stick pan over medium heat and add the turkey bacon. Cook until crispy, turning occasionally to ensure even browning.
Once the bacon is cooked, pour the beaten eggs directly over it in the pan, spreading evenly.

Reduce the heat to low and immediately place a tortilla wrap on top of the eggs while they’re still wet. Gently press the wrap down so it sticks. Let the eggs cook through completely, then carefully flip the entire wrap using a wide spatula. Toast the underside for 1–2 minutes until lightly golden.
With the egg side facing out, layer on fresh spinach, tomato slices, a pinch of salt and pepper, sliced avocado, and a drizzle of spicy mayo. Fold the wrap over, remove from the pan, and serve warm.

jalal::breakfast pizza.name: Breakfast Pizza
ingredients: Pinch of Salt, Pepper and Paprika (For Seasoning)
steps: Preheat your oven to 180°C (350°F) and place a tortilla wrap into a small baking dish or oven-safe bowl, pressing it in so the edges form a raised crust.
Crack a couple of eggs directly into the center of the wrap.
Add chopped chilli pepper, diced tomato, a handful of spinach, and shredded mozzarella on top.
Season with salt, pepper, and any herbs you like.
Bake in the oven for about 10 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the edges of the tortilla are golden. Remove and enjoy immediately!

jalal::pancake tacos.name: Pancake Tacos
steps: In a blender cup, combine oats, Greek yogurt, eggs, baking powder, and a pinch of salt. Blend for about 1–2 minutes until the mixture is completely smooth and pourable.

Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Pour the pancake batter into the pan in small rounds and cook for 1.5–2 minutes per side, or until golden and cooked through. In the same or a separate pan, scramble your eggs and cook 3 pieces of turkey bacon until crispy.
Assemble your plate with the pancakes, scrambled eggs, and turkey bacon. Top with low-fat cheese, a drizzle of sriracha, and your favorite seasonings. Enjoy!

jalal::blt sandwich.name: BLT Sandwich
ingredients: 1 Egg + 2-3 Egg Whites (i used a golden yolk egg)
Salt, Pepper, Chilli Flakes & Garlic Powder (for seasoning)
4 Slices of Leaner Turkey Bacon (you can use any meat slices like chicken or beef)
50g (1.7oz) Sriracha or Spicy Mayo You can reduce the fat by using only egg whites using less or no avocado!
steps: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and lightly spray with oil. Pour in your whisked egg mixture, then immediately lay two slices of wholemeal bread on top of the uncooked egg. Allow the egg to fully cook and set for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to gently loosen the edges of the egg from the pan. Slide the spatula underneath and carefully flip the entire egg and bread layer in one motion.

Once flipped, fold the sides of the cooked egg inward. Layer your fillings on one side: lettuce or greens, sliced tomato, seasonings (salt, pepper, chili flakes, garlic powder), cooked turkey bacon, sliced avocado, and a drizzle of spicy mayo.
Fold the other slice of bread over the filling to form a sandwich. Toast both sides for a couple more minutes until golden and crispy. Slice and serve warm — enjoy!

jalal::cream stuffed french toast.name: Cream Stuffed French Toast
ingredients: 1 Tbsp Fat Free Greek Yogurt (vanilla preferably)
steps: In a bowl or dish, combine the eggs and egg whites, almond milk, vanilla extract, and a dash of cinnamon. Whisk thoroughly until the mixture is frothy and bubbles form on the surface.

Dip the slices of bread into the egg mixture, ensuring both sides are lightly soaked. Heat a pan over medium heat and cook each slice for about 2 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
In a small bowl, mix together cream cheese and Greek yogurt until smooth. Add a teaspoon of your favorite jam and gently fold it in to create a swirled effect.

On a serving plate, start layering by placing a slice of the cooked bread, then spread some of the cream cheese mixture, and top with sliced strawberries. Repeat this layering two more times. Finish with a sprinkle of cinnamon or a drizzle of maple syrup, then enjoy!

jalal::loaded breakfast eggs.name: Loaded Breakfast Eggs
ingredients: 1 Tbsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
steps: Cut the potato into thin chips or fries. Heat a pan over medium-high heat and add olive oil. Once hot, add the potatoes and cook for 5–6 minutes, stirring occasionally until they turn crispy. To speed up cooking and promote even crispiness, cover the pan with a lid.
Add diced onions, bell pepper, and red chili pepper to the pan. Season everything with mixed herbs and paprika, then cook for another 2–3 minutes until the vegetables soften.

Lower the heat and crack in 4 eggs or egg whites evenly over the vegetables. Season again to taste. Cover the pan with a lid and let the eggs cook through, spreading the egg whites evenly for better, consistent cooking. Serve and enjoy!

jalal::creamy scrambled eggs on toast.name: Creamy Scrambled Eggs on Toast
steps: Crack your eggs into a bowl and whisk them thoroughly until well combined. Pour the eggs into a non-stick pan over low heat and begin scrambling, stirring gently until they are about 80% cooked but still slightly soft.
Add dollops of cream cheese to the eggs and slowly fold it in, allowing it to melt and create a creamy texture. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Toast your wholemeal bread, then spoon the creamy scrambled eggs on top. Sprinkle with chili flakes, chopped chives, and drizzle some spicy honey over everything. You’re ready to enjoy!

jalal::tiramisu pancakes.name: Tiramisu Pancakes
ingredients: 1 Coffee Shot (1 Tsp Instant Coffee mixed with 2 Tbsp Almond Milk)
150g (5.3oz) Fat Free Vanilla Greek Yogurt (any yogurt works with some vanilla extract)
steps: Add all your ingredients to a blender cup, starting with the dry ingredients followed by the wet ones. Blend for 1–2 minutes until the batter is completely smooth and lump-free.

Heat a non-stick pan over medium-low heat and lightly spray with oil. Pour in 1/4 cup of the pancake batter and cook for about 2 minutes until bubbles form and the edges are set. Flip and cook for another minute. Repeat with the remaining batter to make 4 pancakes.

Once all pancakes are done, stack them layer by layer—starting with a pancake, then a drizzle of coffee, followed by a spoonful of yogurt. Repeat for all layers. On the final pancake, dust with cocoa powder and enjoy!

jalal::fluffy thick pancakes.name: Fluffy Thick Pancakes
ingredients: 125g (4.4oz) Low Fat Vanilla Greek Yogurt (High Protein)
steps: Add all your ingredients to a blender and blend for 45 seconds to 1 minute until smooth and well combined. Let the batter sit for a few minutes to thicken slightly and allow the ingredients to settle.

Heat a non-stick pan over low heat and lightly spray with oil if needed. Pour in about 1/3 or 1/4 cup of the batter per pancake. Cook each one for 1 to 1.5 minutes per side, flipping once the edges are set and bubbles appear on the surface.
Stack the pancakes on a plate and top with fresh blueberries, sliced strawberries, and a drizzle of sugar-free syrup. Serve and enjoy!

jalal::high protein quesadilla.name: High Protein Quesadilla
ingredients: 3 Slices Tomato (season with Salt and Pepper)
1/2 Tsp Mixed Herbs you can use any low calorie or low fat cheese
steps: Heat a non-stick pan over low heat and lightly spray with oil. Pour in your whisked eggs and let them begin to set for about 1 minute. Then gently press a tortilla onto the eggs and flip it so the tortilla sits underneath and the egg is on top.

Let the egg cook for another 3–4 minutes until fully set. Use a spatula to gently loosen the edges and slide underneath the tortilla to ensure it’s not sticking. Carefully flip it over so the tortilla side is now on the pan.
On one half of the tortilla, layer fresh spinach, tomato slices, cooked turkey bacon, shredded cheese, a drizzle of sriracha, and any desired seasoning.
Fold the other half of the tortilla over to close it. If it’s not golden and crisp enough, toast each side for another minute or two. Serve warm and enjoy!

jalal::loaded omelette low carb.name: Loaded Omelette (Low carb)
ingredients: 1/4 Cup (2oz) Almond or Low Fat Milk
steps: Crack the eggs into a bowl, add a splash of almond or low fat milk, and whisk until fully combined and slightly frothy.
In a pan over medium heat, cook the turkey slices until crispy, then set aside on a plate.
Using the same pan, add halved cherry tomatoes and season with salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic powder. Cook for about 2 minutes, then add spinach and cover until it wilts.
Add the cooked veggies and turkey to the egg mixture, gently stirring to combine.

Pour the egg mixture back into the pan over low heat. Add a few small dollops of cream cheese and lightly season the top. Cook gently until set, or finish under the grill for 2 minutes until lightly golden. Serve and enjoy!

jalal::cheesecake overnight oats.name: Cheesecake Overnight Oats
ingredients: 30g (1.1oz) Fat Free Greek Yogurt (Makes it extra creamy)
steps: In a bowl, combine oats, protein powder, cream cheese, Greek yogurt, strawberry jam, and milk. Mix until smooth and fully combined.
Grab a glass or jar and start layering: begin with granola, then yogurt, followed by jam, cheesecake mixture, more jam, another layer of cheesecake mix, and finish with a spoonful of yogurt.
Add your favorite toppings like fresh fruit, extra granola, or a drizzle of jam.
You can enjoy it right away for a quick treat, or refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight for a creamier texture.
Serve chilled and enjoy!

jalal::original overnight oats.name: Original Overnight Oats
ingredients: 1/2 Cup (4oz) Old Fashioned or Rolled Oats
Handful of Strawberries & Kiwi (Any Fruit You Like)
Chia Seeds note: It Would Be Better to Put Kiwi As a Topping of Mixing It In As it Can Get Bitter
steps: In a jar, add oats, milk, Greek yogurt, chopped strawberries,
Mix everything together until well combined and the texture
Cover the jar and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or overnight
Once chilled, top with sliced kiwi and more fresh strawberries.
Grab a spoon and enjoy straight from the jar!

jalal::breakfast fried rice.name: Breakfast Fried Rice
ingredients: 3 Turkey Bacon or Any Meat Slices
steps: Thinly dice the onion and bell pepper. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat, spray with oil, then add the veggies and turkey bacon. Cover and cook until the bacon is crispy.
Remove the bacon, cut it into small pieces, and set aside. Push the veggies to one side of the pan.
Pour in the eggs and stir continuously over low heat until softly scrambled.
Mix the scrambled eggs with the veggies, then add cooked rice and the chopped bacon back into the pan.
Season with salt, chili flakes, and parsley. Cook everything together for 2–3 minutes on low-medium heat, garnish with spring onion, and enjoy!

jalal::banana bread overnight oats.name: Banana Bread Overnight Oats
steps: In a jar, add oats, mashed banana, Greek yogurt, cinnamon, chopped walnuts, and a protein shake made by mixing protein powder with almond milk.
Stir thoroughly with a spoon until everything is well combined and the texture is creamy.
Seal the jar with a lid and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Before serving, top with a few crushed walnuts and a sprinkle of cinnamon.
Grab a spoon and enjoy—this one’s a favorite for a reason!

jalal::eggs on toast my way.name: Eggs on Toast MY WAY
ingredients: 1 Tsp Olive Oil or Cooking Spray
steps: Heat a pan over medium heat, spray lightly with oil, and crack in your eggs. Season with salt, pepper, chilli flakes, and paprika, then cook until done to your liking.
Toast your bread and place it on a plate. Spread a layer of cream cheese on the toast, then add fresh spinach, avocado slices, and a drizzle of sriracha.
Place the cooked eggs on top of everything.
It’s ready to enjoy, simple, hearty, and full of flavour!

jalal::hi pro pancakes.name: Hi-Pro Pancakes
steps: Add all ingredients to a blender in the listed order and blend until the mixture is completely smooth with no lumps.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Pour in about 1/4 cup of the pancake batter.
Cook for around 2 minutes or until the edges are set and the bottom is golden, then flip and cook the other side.
Stack the cooked pancakes on a plate. Top with fresh berries and a drizzle of low-sugar maple syrup— ready to enjoy!

jalal::french toast muffins.name: French Toast Muffins
ingredients: 1 Cup (8oz) Low Fat or Almond Milk
steps: In a large bowl, whisk together egg whites, almond milk, protein powder, vanilla extract, and cinnamon until smooth and bubbly. Cut 8 slices of low-calorie bread into cubes, then gently fold them into the mixture and let soak for a few minutes.
Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F) and lightly grease a muffin tray with cooking spray.
Divide the soaked bread mixture evenly into the muffin tray cups, topping each with a teaspoon of apple sauce.
Bake for 20–25 minutes until golden and set. Let cool slightly, then enjoy warm with maple syrup if you like!

jalal::breakfast eggs potato.name: Breakfast Eggs & Potato
steps: Dice the potatoes into small pieces and chop all your vegetables. Heat a pan with cooking spray, add the potatoes, season with salt, pepper, and paprika, then cook for about 10 minutes. Spray more oil if needed and cover the pan to speed up cooking.
Push the potatoes to one side of the pan, add the chopped onion and bell pepper, season again, and cook for 2 minutes. Then mix everything together and add the chopped tomatoes.
Make a well in the center of the pan and pour in the eggs. Stir continuously over medium heat until the eggs begin to scramble.
Mix the eggs with the veggies, add a handful of chopped spinach, cook briefly until wilted, then serve hot. Don’t forget to add sriracha for that extra kick! Enjoy!

jalal::breakfast scrambled wrap.name: Breakfast Scrambled Wrap
ingredients: Handful Spinach, Chopped 1 Tsp Salt & Pepper
steps: Dice the onion, bell pepper, and spinach. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat, then add the onion and bell pepper. Season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika, and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the spinach, stir to combine, then push all the veggies to one side of the pan.
Pour the eggs into the empty side and stir continuously until cooked through. Mix the eggs with the veggies.
Place a low-calorie tortilla on a plate, add the egg and veggie mixture in the center, top with mozzarella, sriracha, and sliced avocado. Roll it up and enjoy!

jalal::loaded sandwich.name: Loaded Sandwich
steps: Spray oil on a non-stick pan over low heat. Crack the eggs into the pan and immediately place two slices of bread on top.
Cook until the eggs are almost set, then carefully flip the bread and eggs together using a wide spatula.
Fold the sides of the bread inward, season with salt, pepper, and paprika. Layer turkey slices, bell pepper, mixed greens, sriracha, and low-fat cheese on top.
Fold the top slice of bread over, then toast both sides for a few minutes until crispy. Serve and enjoy!

jalal::sweet potato pancakes.name: Sweet Potato Pancakes
steps: Wash the sweet potatoes and pierce them with a fork. Microwave for about 8 minutes until soft, then peel and transfer to a bowl.
Add egg whites, vanilla extract, cinnamon, and protein powder. Mix until the batter is smooth and well combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat, spray with oil, and pour in about 1/4 cup of the batter per pancake. Cook for 2 minutes on each side until golden. You should get around 7 pancakes.
Stack the pancakes on a plate and top with your favorite toppings—low-sugar maple syrup works great. Enjoy!

jalal::bangin protein smoothie.name: Bangin’ Protein Smoothie
ingredients: 1 Handful Frozen Strawberries (Plus Extra to Serve)
steps: Add all the ingredients to a blender, saving a couple of fresh strawberries the mixture is completely smooth and thick.
Pour the smoothie into a glass, top with the reserved strawberries chilled!

jalal::snickers shake.name: Snickers Shake
ingredients: Sugar Free Chocolate Syrup or Melted Dark Chocolate
steps: Add all your ingredients to a blender one at a time, being careful not to overfill slightly as it blends. Secure the lid and blend on high speed for at least 30 seconds
Pour into a glass, drizzle with sugar-free chocolate syrup, and finish with a sprinkle Serve immediately and enjoy!

jalal::soft fudgy choc cookies.name: Soft & Fudgy Choc Cookies
ingredients: 30g, (1.1oz) Honey or Sugar Free Syrup (For Lower Calories)
steps: In a mixing bowl, combine blended oats, protein powder, cocoa powder, baking powder, applesauce, and honey or sugar-free syrup. Stir until the mixture is smooth, then fold in dark chocolate chips.
Line a baking tray with parchment paper and spoon the mixture into 6 equal portions. Shape into cookies and, if desired, press in extra chocolate chips and sprinkle a little flaky salt on top.
Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C (350°F) for about 7 minutes. Once baked, transfer to a wire rack and let them cool for 5 minutes. Enjoy with a cold glass of milk!

jalal::protein ice cream.name: Protein Ice Cream
steps: Add all the ingredients to a blender or food processor and blend for at least 5 minutes completely thick, smooth, and creamy.
Pour the blended mixture into a container and spread it out evenly. Place it in the freezer
Once frozen, scoop and serve with your favorite toppings—enjoy!

jalal::chewy cookies.name: Chewy Cookies
steps: In a mixing bowl, combine peanut butter, eggs, and coconut sugar. Stir until the mixture is smooth and well blended.
Add protein powder, baking soda, and coconut flour. Mix until a soft dough forms. If you like, fold in some dark chocolate chips.
Line a baking tray with parchment paper. Scoop and shape the dough into 12 small cookies, gently flattening each one with your fingers.
Bake in a preheated oven at 170°C (340°F) for 5 minutes. Let them cool slightly—they should be soft in the center. Enjoy!

jalal::protein rice krispies bars.name: Protein Rice Krispies Bars
steps: In a large bowl, combine Rice Krispies, peanut butter, honey, and protein powder. Mix thoroughly until everything is evenly coated and well combined.

Transfer the mixture to a lined baking dish and press it down firmly using a spatula or your hands until compact. Drizzle melted dark chocolate over the top and refrigerate for at least 1 hour to set.
Once firm, slice into bars and enjoy your homemade protein-packed snack!

jalal::fluffy pancakes.name: Fluffy Pancakes
steps: In a blender cup, combine cottage cheese, coconut flour, eggs, baking powder, and vanilla extract. Blend for 2–4 minutes until the batter is completely smooth. Let it rest for 10 minutes to thicken slightly.

Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and lightly spray with oil if needed. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter for each pancake. Cook for around 2 minutes until the edges set and bubbles form, then flip gently and cook for another 1–2 minutes until golden brown.
Stack your pancakes on a plate and top with your favorite toppings—I used low- sugar maple syrup and fresh blueberries. Time to enjoy!

jalal::golden smoothie bowl.name: Golden Smoothie Bowl
steps: Add all your base ingredients to a blender or food processor (excluding toppings). smooth and thick. Add extra fruit or ice if you want a thicker consistency.
Pour the smoothie into a bowl and top with chia seeds, cacao nibs, and blueberries—or Grab a spoon and enjoy!

jalal::fudgy brownie bowl.name: Fudgy Brownie Bowl
ingredients: 3 Tbsp Low Fat Milk / Almond Milk
steps: In a bowl, combine oat flour, cocoa powder, protein powder, Stir until the mixture is smooth and fully combined.
Add your preferred toppings, then microwave for 40–50 seconds—just overcook it! Let it cool slightly and enjoy warm.

jalal::5 ingredients cookies.name: 5 Ingredients Cookies
steps: In a bowl, mash 2 ripe bananas with a fork, then add the egg, oats, and a scoop thoroughly until fully combined, then fold in some dark chocolate chips.
Line a baking tray and spoon the mixture into 8 evenly sized cookies. Bake in a preheated minutes. Keep an eye on them—don’t overbake. Let cool slightly and enjoy warm!

jalal::rice pancakes.name: Rice Pancakes
steps: In a blender, combine cooked rice, whole eggs, egg whites, protein powder, baking powder, cinnamon, and vanilla extract. Blend for a few minutes until smooth.
Adjust the batter consistency if needed—add more egg whites if it’s too thick, or more rice if too runny.
Heat a non-stick pan over low-medium heat. Pour in 1/4 cup of the batter for each pancake and cook for about 1 minute per side, or until golden. You should get around 5 pancakes.
Stack the pancakes and top with your choice of toppings. I used half a banana, low sugar maple syrup, and a dollop of whipped cream. Enjoy!

mealprep::honey garlic butter chicken ma.name: Honey Garlic Butter chicken Mac n cheese
ingredients: 1 Tsp Chilli Flakes (omit for milder flavour)
½ Tsp Nutmeg (adds a great deep flavour!)
100g (3.5oz) Low Fat Cheddar Cheese (or any low fat cheese)
220g (8oz) Uncooked Macaroni Pasta (or pasta of choice)
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into cubes. In a bowl, season with salt, pepper, chili flakes, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika and olive oil. Mix until evenly coated, then set aside.
Bring a pot of water to a boil and add the macaroni. Cook for 8 minutes until the pasta is al dente, then drain immediately and set aside, as the pasta will finish cooking in the sauce.
Heat a large pan over medium heat and melt 10g of butter. Add half of the chicken cubes in a single layer and cook for 5 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy

Now lower the heat, add an extra 10g of butter, minced garlic, a drizzle of honey, and freshly chopped parsley. Toss the chicken until it’s well coated in these vibrant flavours. Remove the chicken and set aside. Repeat for the second batch.

In the same pan on low heat with the flavorful butter left behind, add more minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Stir in milk and cream cheese, then season with salt, black pepper, smoked paprika, and a pinch of nutmeg. Mix until the sauce is smooth.
Stir in grated cheddar cheese until it melts into the sauce and thickens slightly. Add the drained macaroni and gently toss to ensure everything is evenly coated.
Portion the mac n cheese with the juicy honey garlic chicken into 4 servings and ENJOY!

mealprep::crispy salt n pepper chicken c.name: crispy Salt n Pepper chicken & chips
ingredients: 2-3 Tsp Olive Oil (for cooking) n Pepper Chips
1 Tsp each Salt, Pepper, Garlic Powder, Paprika
1 Tsp each Salt, Pepper, Garlic Powder, Paprika, Chilli Flakes
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into cubes. In a bowl, marinate the cubes with soy sauce, black pepper, garlic powder, and cornflour. Mix thoroughly until the color changes; if needed, add more soy sauce and spices.

Slice your washed potatoes into chips. Arrange them on a lined baking tray (use baking paper) and season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, paprika, and olive oil until evenly coated. Oven bake at 210°C/420°F for 25 minutes or air fry for 15 minutes.

While the chips are cooking, heat a pan over medium heat and add olive oil. Cook the marinated chicken for 4–5 minutes on each side until a golden-brown, crispy crust forms. If needed, cook a few extra minutes. Remove the chicken and set aside, cooking in batches if necessary.

In the same pan, over medium heat, add the chopped onions and bell peppers. Sauté for 2–4 minutes until softened. Then add extra salt, pepper, garlic powder, paprika, chilli flakes, a drizzle of honey, the cooked chips, and chopped green onion.
Mix everything together until well incorporated and let cook for an additional 1–2 minutes. Finally, divide into 4 equal servings and ENJOY!

mealprep::creamy chipotle steak potatoes.name: creamy chipotle Steak & Potatoes
ingredients: 800g (28oz) Raw Topside/Top Sirloin Beef, 1 inch cubed
2 Tsp Olive Oil and Final Glaze
steps: Slice the steaks into 1 inch cubes. Season with salt, garlic powder, parsley, cumin, smoked paprika, lime juice, and olive oil. Mix thoroughly until each piece is well coated.
Wash the potatoes and cut into small cubes. Place them in a bowl and mix with Italian herbs, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and olive oil until evenly coated.
Arrange the seasoned potatoes on a lined baking tray (use baking paper). Oven bake or air fry at 200°C/400°F for 20–22 minutes until golden and crispy.
While the potatoes are cooking, heat a pan over medium-high heat and add 5g of butter. Cook half of the steak bites for about 2-3 minutes per side until a beautiful brown crust forms.

Once cooked, lower the heat completely, then add 5g extra butter and freshly chopped parsley to the pan. Toss the steak bites until each piece is well coated, then set aside. Repeat for the second batch.

In the same pan over medium-low heat, add chopped garlic and red onion. Sauté for 5 minutes until softened, then stir in Italian herbs and chipotle paste for 2-3 minutes. Next, add evaporated milk, cream cheese, and grated parmesan; stir until the sauce is smooth and creamy.
Drop the crispy potatoes and fold into the sauce, ensuring every piece is well coated. Divide the dish evenly with the steak bites, and ENJOY!

mealprep::lemon pepper chicken rice bowl.name: Lemon Pepper chicken Rice Bowls
ingredients: 800g (28oz) Raw Boneless Skinless Chicken Thighs, cubed
2 Tsp Olive Oil Cooking & Final Glaze
steps: Trim any excess fat from the chicken thighs and cut them into cubes. Season with salt, black pepper, oregano, chilli flakes, garlic powder, paprika, lemon zest & juice, and olive oil.
Mix the chicken thoroughly until the color deepens, then set aside to marinate. Meanwhile, prepare your white basmati rice for later use.

In a bowl, combine yogurt, mayo, Dijon mustard, garlic & onion powder, salt, pepper, lemon juice, and parsley. Mix until smooth, then fold in the chopped tomato and cucumber. Give it one final mix till creamy and well coated.

Heat a pan over medium-high heat and melt butter. Sear the marinated chicken for 6–7 minutes until golden brown. Lower the heat, then drizzle with lemon juice and honey. Toss until the chicken is well glazed, then set aside.
In the same pan on low heat, add chopped garlic and onion. Sauté for 5 minutes until fragrant, then stir in turmeric, paprika, salt, and oregano. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.

Add the cooked basmati rice and fresh parsley to the pan. Mix well until the rice turns a vibrant golden yellow. Drizzle with a little more lemon juice, toss, and serve alongside the lemon pepper chicken and ranch salad then ENJOY!

mealprep::cheesy beef taco potato bowls.name: cheesy Beef Taco Potato Bowls
ingredients: 40g (1.4oz) Shredded Mozzarella (or any low fat cheese / 10g per serving)
20g (0.7oz) Grass Fed Butter (or butter of choice)
¾ Tsp each Salt, Paprika, Garlic Powder de Gallo
½ Tsp each Salt, Pepper, Garlic Powder, Cumin, Paprika
steps: Slice the potatoes into small cubes and place them in a mixing bowl. Season with 1 serving of taco spice mix and a drizzle of olive oil. Toss until evenly coated, then spread them on a lined baking sheet (use baking paper). Bake or air fry at 200°C/400°F for 20–22 minutes until golden and crispy.
For the chipotle spicy sauce, blend yogurt, mayo, chipotle paste, buffalo hot sauce, honey, salt, paprika, and garlic powder until smooth and creamy. Store in a bottle to use throughout the week.

For the pico de gallo, combine chopped tomatoes, red onion, red and green bell peppers, and coriander in a large bowl. Season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, cumin, paprika, and lime juice. Mix well, then store in a separate container for the week.

Heat a pan over medium-high heat and melt the butter. Add the ground beef and cook for 8 minutes, breaking it up with a spatula until fully browned. Stir in tomato paste and 1.5 servings of taco spice mix, then cook for another 4 minutes until juicy and golden.
Top the taco beef with shredded mozzarella and serve with crispy potatoes, pico de gallo, and a generous drizzle of chipotle spicy sauce. Enjoy!

mealprep::grilled chicken alfredo pasta.name: Grilled chicken Alfredo Pasta
ingredients: 1 Tsp Chilli Flakes (omit for less heat)
20g (1oz) Reduced Fat Butter Tomato Alfredo Sauce
1 Tsp each Salt, Italian Herbs, Parsley, Paprika
½ Tsp Chilli Flakes (omit for milder flavour)
Optional Pasta Water if the sauce is too thick
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into cubes. In a bowl, season with salt, Italian herbs, parsley, chilli flakes, garlic powder, paprika, and olive oil. Mix thoroughly until evenly coated, then set aside.
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook for 7-8 minutes until al dente. Before draining, reserve 1/4 cup of pasta water, then set the pasta aside.
Heat a large pan over medium-high heat and melt 5g of butter. Add half of the seasoned chicken in a single layer and sear for 3–4 minutes per side, allowing a rich golden crust to form.
Reduce the heat to low, then add 10g extra butter and gently stir the chicken until glossy and well coated. Remove from the pan and repeat for the second batch.

In the same pan on low heat add chopped garlic and onion. Sauté for 5 minutes until soft and aromatic, then mix in additional seasoning (salt, Italian herbs, parsley, chilli flakes, paprika) to enhance the depth of flavor.

Pour in tomato passata and let it simmer on low heat for 5 minutes, allowing the sauce to thicken and intensify in flavor. Stir in evaporated milk, cream cheese, and grated parmesan, mixing until smooth and velvety.
Gently fold in the cooked pasta, ensuring it’s well coated in the creamy, flavorful sauce. Serve with the succulent grilled chicken, divide into 4 portions, and enjoy this rich, high-protein meal!

mealprep::garlic butter steak bites caju.name: Garlic Butter Steak Bites & cajun Mac n cheese
ingredients: 800g (28oz) Raw Topside/Top Sirloin Beef, 1 inch cubed
2 Tbsp Fresh Parsley, chopped Mac n Cheese
200g (7oz) Uncooked Macaroni Pasta (or pasta of choice)
steps: Cut the steaks into 1 inch cubes. In a bowl, season the cubes with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, parsley, chilli powder and olive oil. Mix well, then let the meat marinate for 10 minutes.

Bring a pot of water to a boil and add the macaroni pasta. Cook for 8 minutes until al dente. While the pasta is boiling, begin cooking the steak bites. Once the pasta is ready, drain and set it aside.
Heat a large pan over medium-high heat and melt 10g of butter. Sear half of the steak bites for about 3 minutes on each side until a golden brown crust forms.

Lower the heat to low, add extra 10g of butter, minced garlic, and chopped parsley to the pan. Toss the steak bites in this flavorful butter until each piece is well coated. Remove the beef from the pan and keep warm. Repeat this for the second batch.
Using the same pan on low heat, add the milk, cream cheese, cheddar, mozzarella, and the Cajun spice mix. Stir continuously until the sauce becomes smooth and indulgently creamy.
Now add the cooked pasta in the sauce, give it a good mix till combined. Garnish with parsley then serve with the delicious steak bites and your high protein meals are ready for the week!

mealprep::honey chipotle chicken rice.name: Honey chipotle chicken Rice
ingredients: 70g Chipotle Paste or Chipotle Peppers in Adobo
280g Raw Basmati Rice (Cook this prior to making this)
steps: Place the boneless, skinless chicken thighs in a bowl and season with salt, oregano, garlic powder, smoked paprika, cumin, chipotle paste, honey, and fresh lime juice. Mix thoroughly until the chicken is fully coated and deeply coloured, then set aside to marinate.
While the chicken marinates, heat a pan over medium heat, melt a knob of butter, then add chopped onions. Cook for 5–6 minutes until soft, golden, and fragrant.
Add the seasoning blend: salt, turmeric, garlic powder, smoked paprika, and cumin. Stir well to coat the onions and let the spices toast for 1–2 minutes to deepen the flavour and aroma.
Add your cooked basmati rice to the pan. Gently fold it in using a spatula, mixing thoroughly until every grain is coated and turn a bright yellow colour.
Turn off the heat, then add a generous handful of fresh chopped coriander (cilantro) and a squeeze of lime juice. Mix to finish the rice — vibrant, fluffy, and fragrant.
Lay the marinated chicken thighs evenly on a lined sheet pan. Oven bake or air fry at 200°C (400°F) for 20–23 minutes, or until golden, juicy, and slightly charred at the edges.

While the chicken rests make the sauce. In a blender cup add yogurt, mayo, chipotle paste, pineapple chunks, salt, garlic & onion powder and lime juice. Blend for 30–60 seconds until completely smooth and creamy.

Bottle up the sauce for the week (great for wraps, bowls). Slice the rested chicken into bite-sized cubes, then serve with the golden rice and a generous drizzle of the pineapple chipotle sauce.Your flavour- packed high protein meals are ready to ENJOY!

mealprep::honey chilli lime chicken.name: Honey chilli Lime chicken
ingredients: 1 Tsp each: Salt, Black Pepper, Onion Powder, Chilli Powder, Cumin, Paprika Marinade
1 Tbsp Fresh Coriander, chopped & Final Glaze
50g (2oz) Habanero Hot Sauce (or hot sauce of choice)
210-220g (7.4-7.8oz) Uncooked Basmati Rice (yields approximately 560g or 20oz cooked)
200g (7oz) Avocado, thinly sliced (50g or 1.75oz per serving)
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into cubes. Place them in a bowl and add minced garlic, 1.5 servings chilli lime spice mix, drizzle of honey, freshly squeezed lime juice, and chopped coriander. Mix well until the color deepens and every cube is evenly coated.

For the chilli lime sauce, combine yoghurt, mayonnaise, your favorite hot sauce, honey, chilli powder, garlic powder, and a squeeze of lime juice in a blender. Blend until velvety and completely smooth!
(Optional) Bottle the sauce in batches and refrigerate for future meals.
Bring a pot of water to a boil and add the basmati rice. Simmer until the rice is fluffy and tender, then drain and set aside.

Meanwhile, slice the avocado into delicate pieces. Heat a pan over medium heat, melt some butter, and add the marinated chicken. Sauté for 6–8 minutes until the chicken turns golden brown with a slight char.
Once cooked, Lower the heat and add extra butter with a drizzle of honey. Stir for 1–2 minutes until the chicken is beautifully glazed. Repeat until all the chicken is cooked
Finally serve distribute the chicken evenly with a side of rice, avocado and top with the chilli lime sauce and ENJOY!

mealprep::garlic butter chicken creamy p.name: Garlic Butter chicken & creamy Potatoes
ingredients: 2 Tsp Olive Oil and Final Glaze
2 Tsp Olive Oil (Optional) or Cooking Spray
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into cubes. In a bowl, season them with salt, parsley, chilli flakes, garlic & onion powder, paprika, and olive oil. Mix thoroughly until the color deepens and all cubes are well coated.
Wash and dice the potatoes into small, even cubes. In another bowl, season them with the same spices and a light drizzle of olive oil. Toss until every piece is evenly coated.
Place the seasoned potatoes on a lined sheet pan (use baking paper) and bake or air fry at 200°C/400°F for 20–22 minutes until golden and crispy.
Meanwhile, heat a pan over medium-high heat and melt 10g of butter. Add half of the marinated chicken in a single layer and cook for 3–4 minutes per side until a golden- brown crust forms.

Once cooked, lower the heat and add 5g extra butter, minced garlic, and parsley. Stir until each piece is evenly coated in the rich, garlic butter, then transfer to a plate. Repeat this process for the remaining chicken.

Back to the pan on low heat, add evaporated milk with garlic & herb cream cheese. Stir until the cheese melts and the sauce thickens slightly for about 5 minutes. Add the crispy potatoes in the sauce, gently mix until well combined and creamy
Finally serve and distribute into equal servings with the delicious chicken and your high protein meals are ready for the week, ENJOY!

mealprep::philly cheese steak mac n chee.name: Philly cheese Steak Mac n cheese
ingredients: 20g (0.7oz) Grass Fed Butter (or any butter for cooking)
1.5 Tsp each Salt, Pepper, Paprika, Chilli Flakes
½ 125g ( Cup or 4.5oz) Pasta Water (after the pasta is cooked)
steps: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the macaroni and cook for 7–8 minutes until slightly underdone. Before draining, reserve 1 cup of pasta water (keep extra on hand if needed). Drain the pasta and set it aside.

While the pasta cooks, heat a pan over medium heat. Melt the butter, then add the minced garlic, chopped onion, and mixed bell peppers. Sauté for 5–6 minutes until the vegetables become soft and fragrant.

Push the vegetables to the edges of the pan to create a central well. Add the minced beef along with salt, pepper, paprika, and chilli flakes. Break the beef into small pieces with a spatula and cook on high heat for 6–8 minutes until it is fully browned. Once browned, mix the beef with the vegetables.

Reduce the heat to low and add the cream cheese, shredded mozzarella, cheese slices, and the reserved pasta water. Stir continuously until the cheese melts and the sauce becomes smooth, creamy, and well combined with the beef and vegetables.

Lastly add the cooked macaroni into the sauce, mixing thoroughly to ensure everything is well coated. If needed, add extra pasta water to adjust the consistency. Finally, distribute the dish evenly into 4 servings, garnish with parsley, and ENJOY!

mealprep::creamy honey garlic steak nood.name: creamy Honey Garlic Steak Noodles
ingredients: 80g (2.8oz) Gochujang Paste (adjust to your spice level) »»
125 ( ½ Cup) Noodle/ Pasta Water (From the boiled noodles)
Garnish Green Onion, Sesame Seeds, Parmesan Cheese
steps: Dice the beef into 1-inch cubes. Season with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, and olive oil. Mix thoroughly until evenly coated, then set aside to marinate.
Bring a pot of water to a boil, then add raw noodles and cook for 4–5 minutes or according to packet instructions. Do not overcook.
Reserve 1 cup of noodle water, then drain and rinse noodles under cold water to stop cooking. Set aside.
Heat a pan on medium heat, melt butter, and sear the steak bites for 3–4 minutes per side until golden and charred.
Lower the heat, then add more butter, minced garlic, a drizzle of honey, and chopped parsley. Mix for 1 minute until the steak is coated and juicy. Set aside and repeat for remaining steak.
In the same pan on low heat, sauté minced garlic in the leftover butter for 2 minutes until fragrant. Add gochujang paste and stir for 1–2 minutes until combined.

Pour in milk, cream cheese, and grated parmesan. Stir continuously until melted and smooth, then add reserved noodle water and mix again. Let the sauce thicken for 1–2 minutes, then add the cooked noodles. Gently mix to coat well.
Serve the creamy gochujang noodles with the juicy steak bites. Garnish as desired and ENJOY!

mealprep::creamy garlic cheesy chicken p.name: creamy Garlic cheesy chicken & Potatoes V2
ingredients: 1000g Raw Chicken Breast cut into cubes
1 Tbsp (30g) Minced Garlic or Garlic Paste
1.5 Tsp Chilli Flakes (Optional if you don’t like spicy)
80g Shredded Mozzarella or any Low Fat Cheese Potatoes
1100g Raw Yellow or White Potatoes cut into small cubes
steps: First slice your chicken breasts into cubes then add minced garlic, salt, mixed herbs, smoked paprika, onion powder, chilli flakes and olive oil. Mix till the colour changes!
Now slice your raw potatoes into small cubes and place in a bowl. Season with salt, garlic powder, mixed herbs, paprika and olive oil. Mix till everything is well coated
Place them on a lined sheet pan then oven bake or air fry for 20-22 mins till golden and crispy then set aside

Next get a pan on medium heat, melt down butter then cook your chicken for 4-5 mins each side till golden and juicy. You want to develop a golden brown crust! Note You will need to cook off all the chicken first before moving with the rest of the recipe
Now lower the heat and add milk and garlic and herb cream cheese. Give this a mix till everything melts and is well combined
Bring the sauce to a light bubble then add all your crispy potatoes in the pan with the chicken. Give it a gentle but thorough mix till fully incorporated
Final touch, add a layer of shredded mozzarella over the top then cover the pan with a lid for 3-4 mins to let the cheese melt!
Finally distribute into 5 even servings and your high protein meals are ready to enjoy for the week!

mealprep::creamy cajun chicken rice.name: creamy cajun chicken & Rice
ingredients: 1 Tsp each: Salt, Black Pepper, Garlic Powder, Onion Powder, Oregano, Thyme, Paprika, Chilli Powder Marinade
25g (1oz) Grass Fed Butter (or any butter) Cajun Rice
steps: Butterfly the chicken breasts into thinner halves. Season with 1.5 servings of Cajun spice mix and olive oil. Mix until both sides are fully coated, then let it marinate.
Cook the plain white rice for later. Bring a pot of water to a boil, add basmati rice, and cook for 8–10 minutes until fully cooked and fluffy. Drain and set aside.
Heat a pan over medium heat, melt butter, and cook the chicken fillets in batches for 3–4 minutes per side until golden and charred, then set aside.

Using the same pan with the flavorful butter left behind, keep the heat on medium and add chopped onion and garlic. Sauté for 5 minutes until fragrant, then stir in ½ serving of Cajun spice mix. Cook for 2–3 minutes until the spices are toasted and aromatic.
Add the cooked rice to the pan and mix thoroughly until every grain is coated and takes on the color of the spices. Stir in fresh parsley, then set aside.

For the creamy sauce, on low heat melt butter in a pan, then stir in ½ serving of Cajun spice mix. Toast for 1–2 minutes before adding milk, cream cheese, and parmesan. Stir over low heat for 4–5 minutes until smooth and slightly thickened.
Slice the cooked chicken into strips and serve over the spiced rice. Drizzle with the creamy sauce, garnish with fresh parsley, and enjoy your high- protein meals for the week!

mealprep::garlic butter steak bites.name: Garlic Butter Steak Bites
ingredients: 800g (28oz) Raw Topside/Top Sirloin Beef, 1 inch cubed
2 Tsp Olive Oil and Final Glaze
15g (1 Tbsp) Sriracha or any Hot Sauce
steps: Cut the steaks into 1-inch cubes. Season with salt, steak bites for 2–3 minutes per side until a rich, black pepper, garlic powder, parsley, and olive oil. golden crust forms. Mix thoroughly until evenly coated, then set aside.

Lower the heat and add 10g extra butter, minced Dice the uncooked potatoes into small cubes garlic, and chopped parsley. Stir for 1–2 minutes and place them in a bowl. Season with salt, black until the steak bites are fully coated in this garlic pepper, smoked paprika, garlic powder, parsley, butter, then remove from heat. Repeat for the and a drizzle of olive oil (optional). Mix well, then second batches. spread them on a lined baking sheet (use baking
paper). Oven bake or air fry at 200°C/400°F for Prepare the spicy mayo by mixing light mayo, 20–22 minutes until crispy and golden. sriracha, and lemon juice in a bowl. Serve the steak

bites with the crispy potatoes, drizzle with the While the potatoes cook, heat a pan over medium- spicy mayo, and enjoy your high-protein meals for high heat and melt 10g butter. Sear the half of the the week!

mealprep::crispy garlic chicken fried ri.name: crispy Garlic chicken Fried Rice
ingredients: 1000g (35oz) Raw Boneless Skinless Chicken Thighs, cubed
1 Tbsp Fresh Parsley, finely chopped Butter Fried Rice
Extra Seasoning: 1 Tsp each Black Pepper, Onion Powder, Parsley
20g (1oz) Dark Soy Sauce (add more if needed)
50g (1.8oz) Spring Onion, green part chopped Yum Yum Sauce (enough for 8+ meals)
Dash of Milk or Water for desired consistency
steps: Slice the boneless, skinless chicken thighs into bite-sized cubes. Season with black pepper, chilli flakes, garlic powder, onion powder, light and dark soy sauce, and olive oil. Mix thoroughly until well coated and the colour deepens. Set aside to marinate.

To make the Garlic Yum Yum sauce, combine light mayo, ketchup, sriracha, minced garlic, ginger powder, and rice vinegar in a bowl. Mix until completely smooth. Add a splash of milk or water to adjust the consistency if needed. Bottle and store in the fridge to use throughout the week.

Heat a pan over medium heat and melt a little butter. Cook the marinated chicken for about 5 minutes per side until golden, crispy, and cooked through. Add a handful of freshly chopped parsley, stir to coat the chicken well, then set aside to rest.
In the same pan, add a knob of butter and the chopped onion . Cook on medium heat for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring halfway through, until softened and caramelised.

Add chopped green onion (white part) and finely chopped carrots. Season with black pepper, onion powder, and parsley. Stir everything together until fragrant, then push the vegetables to one side of the pan.
In the empty side of the pan, pour in the beaten eggs. Stir continuously until scrambled and fully cooked, then mix in with the sautéed vegetables.

Add your leftover cooked rice to the pan, followed by soy sauce, oyster sauce, and chopped green onion (green part). Mix everything thoroughly until well combined and each grain of rice catches a deep colour. Add more soy sauce, if needed.
Serve the fried rice with the crispy chicken in 5 equal portions. Drizzle with Garlic Yum Yum sauce , garnish with sesame seeds, and ENJOY! 47

mealprep::honey bbq chicken garlic parme.name: Honey BBQ chicken & Garlic Parmesan Potatoes
ingredients: 160g (5.6oz) Sugar Free BBQ Sauce (Brand: G Hughes)
2 Tbsp Fresh Parsley, chopped Parmesan Potatoes
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into bite-sized cubes. Mix everything together until the chicken is well Season with garlic powder, smoked paprika, cumin, coated and juicy. Set aside. salt, black pepper, and olive oil. Mix thoroughly until

the chicken is well coated and the colour deepens. In a blender, combine cottage cheese and milk. Set aside to marinate while you prepare the potatoes Blend for 2 minutes until completely smooth. Pour

the mixture into the same pan on low heat. Add Slice the raw potatoes into small, even cubes and Italian herbs, garlic powder, and grated parmesan. place them in a large mixing bowl. Season with salt, Stir gently as the sauce warms through and Italian herbs, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion begins to thicken slightly. Do not boil the sauce - powder, grated parmesan, and olive oil. Mix well until overheating will cause it to split. all the potatoes are evenly coated. Spread them out
